1→package com.court.assistant.ui
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.animation.*
     4→import androidx.compose.foundation.background
     5→import androidx.compose.foundation.border
     6→import androidx.compose.foundation.clickable
     7→import androidx.compose.foundation.combinedClickable
     8→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
     9→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.LazyColumn
    10→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.items
    11→import androidx.compose.foundation.shape.RoundedCornerShape
    12→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
    13→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.DateRange
    14→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.Delete
    15→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.KeyboardArrowDown
    16→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.KeyboardArrowUp
    17→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.Refresh
    18→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.Share
    19→import androidx.compose.material3.*
    20→import androidx.compose.runtime.*
    21→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
    22→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    23→import androidx.compose.ui.draw.clip
    24→import androidx.compose.foundation.ExperimentalFoundationApi
    25→import androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextOverflow
    26→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    27→import com.court.assistant.data.db.PdfDocumentEntity
    28→import com.court.assistant.ui.theme.*
    29→import com.court.assistant.viewmodel.MainViewModel
    30→import com.court.assistant.viewmodel.SmsWithPdfs
    31→import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
    32→import java.util.*
    33→
    34→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    35→@Composable
    36→fun MainScreen(
    37→    viewModel: MainViewModel,
    38→    onOpenWebView: (smsId: Long, url: String) -> Unit,
    39→    onOpenPdf: (pdfId: Long) -> Unit
    40→) {
    41→    val state by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    42→    val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
    43→    var showClearDialog by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    44→
    45→    if (showClearDialog) {
    46→        AlertDialog(
    47→            onDismissRequest = { showClearDialog = false },
    48→            title = { Text("清除所有数据") },
    49→            text = { Text("将清除所有短信记录和已下载的文书，确认清除？") },
    50→            confirmButton = {
    51→                TextButton(onClick = {
    52→                    showClearDialog = false
    53→                    viewModel.clearAllData()
    54→                }) { Text("确认清除", color = CinnabarRed) }
    55→            },
    56→            dismissButton = {
    57→                TextButton(onClick = { showClearDialog = false }) { Text("取消") }
    58→            }
    59→        )
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    LaunchedEffect(state.message) {
    63→        state.message?.let {
    64→            snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(it)
    65→            viewModel.clearMessage()
    66→        }
    67→    }
    68→
    69→    Scaffold(
    70→        snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) },
    71→        topBar = {
    72→            TopAppBar(
    73→                title = {
    74→                    Text("法院助手", style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium)
    75→                },
    76→                actions = {
    77→                    IconButton(onClick = { viewModel.syncAllToCalendar() }) {
    78→                        Icon(Icons.Default.DateRange, contentDescription = "同步日程")
    79→                    }
    80→                    IconButton(onClick = { viewModel.loadSms() }) {
    81→                        Icon(Icons.Default.Refresh, contentDescription = "刷新短信")
    82→                    }
    83→                    IconButton(onClick = { showClearDialog = true }) {
    84→                        Icon(Icons.Default.Delete, contentDescription = "清除数据")
    85→                    }
    86→                },
    87→                colors = TopAppBarDefaults.topAppBarColors(
    88→                    containerColor = Ivory,
    89→                    titleContentColor = InkBlack
    90→                )
    91→            )
    92→        },
    93→        bottomBar = {
    94→            Surface(
    95→                color = ParchmentBg,
    96→                tonalElevation = 0.dp
    97→            ) {
    98→                Text(
    99→                    text = "宋氏美学，单夫纯律师制作保留权利",
   100→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   101→                    color = CharcoalGray.copy(alpha = 0.6f),
   102→                    modifier = Modifier
   103→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   104→                        .padding(vertical = 8.dp, horizontal = 16.dp)
   105→                )
   106→            }
   107→        }
   108→    ) { padding ->
   109→        Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize().padding(padding)) {
   110→            if (state.loading) {
   111→                CircularProgressIndicator(
   112→                    modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.Center),
   113→                    color = CinnabarRed
   114→                )
   115→            } else if (state.smsWithPdfs.isEmpty()) {
   116→                Text(
   117→                    "暂无法院短信\n点击右上角刷新读取",
   118→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   119→                    color = CharcoalGray,
   120→                    modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.Center)
   121→                )
   122→            } else {
   123→                LazyColumn(
   124→                    modifier = Modifier
   125→                        .fillMaxSize()
   126→                        .background(MistGray),
   127→                    contentPadding = PaddingValues(12.dp),
   128→                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)
   129→                ) {
   130→                    items(state.smsWithPdfs, key = { it.sms.id }) { item ->
   131→                        SmsMenuCard(
   132→                            item = item,
   133→                            onOpenWebView = onOpenWebView,
   134→                            onOpenPdf = onOpenPdf,
   135→                            onSharePdfs = { viewModel.sharePdfs(it) },
   136→                            onSyncCalendar = { viewModel.syncPdfToCalendar(it) }
   137→                        )
   138→                    }
   139→                }
   140→            }
   141→        }
   142→    }
   143→}
   144→
   145→@Composable
   146→fun SmsMenuCard(
   147→    item: SmsWithPdfs,
   148→    onOpenWebView: (smsId: Long, url: String) -> Unit,
   149→    onOpenPdf: (pdfId: Long) -> Unit,
   150→    onSharePdfs: (List<Long>) -> Unit,
   151→    onSyncCalendar: (Long) -> Unit
   152→) {
   153→    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   154→    val selectedIds = remember { mutableStateListOf<Long>() }
   155→    val dateFormat = remember { SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA) }
   156→
   157→    // 清除选中状态当收缩时
   158→    if (!expanded) selectedIds.clear()
   159→
   160→    Card(
   161→        modifier = Modifier
   162→            .fillMaxWidth()
   163→            .border(1.dp, MistGray, RoundedCornerShape(8.dp)),
   164→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(8.dp),
   165→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = WarmWhite),
   166→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 3.dp)
   167→    ) {
   168→        Column {
   169→            // 头部 - 浅米色背景
   170→            Row(
   171→                modifier = Modifier
   172→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   173→                    .background(Ivory)
   174→                    .clickable { expanded = !expanded }
   175→                    .padding(12.dp),
   176→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   177→            ) {
   178→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   179→                    Row(
   180→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   181→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
   182→                    ) {
   183→                        Text(
   184→                            dateFormat.format(Date(item.sms.receivedAt)),
   185→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   186→                            color = CharcoalGray
   187→                        )
   188→                        item.sms.partyNames?.let {
   189→                            Text(
   190→                                it,
   191→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge,
   192→                                color = CinnabarRed
   193→                            )
   194→                        }
   195→                    }
   196→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   197→                    Row(
   198→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   199→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
   200→                    ) {
   201→                        item.sms.courtName?.let {
   202→                            Text(
   203→                                it,
   204→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   205→                                color = InkBlack
   206→                            )
   207→                        }
   208→                        item.sms.caseNumber?.let {
   209→                            Text(
   210→                                it,
   211→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   212→                                color = CharcoalGray,
   213→                                maxLines = 1,
   214→                                overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   215→                            )
   216→                        }
   217→                    }
   218→                    if (item.sms.webUrl != null && item.pdfs.isEmpty()) {
   219→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   220→                        Text(
   221→                            "📄 点击展开查看文书",
   222→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   223→                            color = AmberGold
   224→                        )
   225→                    }
   226→                    if (item.pdfs.isNotEmpty()) {
   227→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(2.dp))
   228→                        Text(
   229→                            "${item.pdfs.size} 个文书",
   230→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   231→                            color = JadeGreen
   232→                        )
   233→                    }
   234→                }
   235→                Icon(
   236→                    if (expanded) Icons.Default.KeyboardArrowUp else Icons.Default.KeyboardArrowDown,
   237→                    contentDescription = null,
   238→                    tint = CharcoalGray
   239→                )
   240→            }
   241→
   242→            AnimatedVisibility(visible = expanded) {
   243→                Column(
   244→                    modifier = Modifier
   245→                        .background(ParchmentBg)
   246→                        .padding(start = 12.dp, end = 12.dp, bottom = 12.dp, top = 8.dp),
   247→                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   248→                ) {
   249→                    if (item.sms.webUrl != null) {
   250→                        if (item.pdfs.isEmpty()) {
   251→                            Button(
   252→                                onClick = { onOpenWebView(item.sms.id, item.sms.webUrl!!) },
   253→                                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   254→                                colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   255→                                    containerColor = CinnabarRed,
   256→                                    contentColor = WarmWhite
   257→                                ),
   258→                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp)
   259→                            ) {
   260→                                Text("打开送达链接下载文书")
   261→                            }
   262→                        } else {
   263→                            OutlinedButton(
   264→                                onClick = { onOpenWebView(item.sms.id, item.sms.webUrl!!) },
   265→                                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   266→                                colors = ButtonDefaults.outlinedButtonColors(contentColor = CharcoalGray),
   267→                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp)
   268→                            ) {
   269→                                Text("继续下载文书")
   270→                            }
   271→                        }
   272→                    }
   273→                    item.pdfs.forEach { pdf ->
   274→                        val selected = pdf.id in selectedIds
   275→                        PdfCard(
   276→                            pdf = pdf,
   277→                            selected = selected,
   278→                            onClick = {
   279→                                if (selectedIds.isNotEmpty()) {
   280→                                    if (selected) selectedIds.remove(pdf.id) else selectedIds.add(pdf.id)
   281→                                } else {
   282→                                    onOpenPdf(pdf.id)
   283→                                }
   284→                            },
   285→                            onLongClick = {
   286→                                if (selected) selectedIds.remove(pdf.id) else selectedIds.add(pdf.id)
   287→                            },
   288→                            onSyncCalendar = { onSyncCalendar(pdf.id) }
   289→                        )
   290→                    }
   291→                    // 分享按钮
   292→                    if (item.pdfs.isNotEmpty()) {
   293→                        Row(
   294→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   295→                            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.End,
   296→                            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   297→                        ) {
   298→                            if (selectedIds.isNotEmpty()) {
   299→                                Text(
   300→                                    "已选 ${selectedIds.size} 个",
   301→                                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   302→                                    color = CharcoalGray
   303→                                )
   304→                                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   305→                            }
   306→                            FilledTonalButton(
   307→                                onClick = {
   308→                                    val ids = if (selectedIds.isNotEmpty()) selectedIds.toList()
   309→                                              else item.pdfs.map { it.id }
   310→                                    onSharePdfs(ids)
   311→                                },
   312→                                colors = ButtonDefaults.filledTonalButtonColors(
   313→                                    containerColor = JadeGreen.copy(alpha = 0.15f),
   314→                                    contentColor = JadeGreen
   315→                                ),
   316→                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp),
   317→                                contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 6.dp)
   318→                            ) {
   319→                                Icon(Icons.Default.Share, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp))
   320→                                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   321→                                Text(if (selectedIds.isNotEmpty()) "分享选中" else "分享全部")
   322→                            }
   323→                        }
   324→                    }
   325→                }
   326→            }
   327→        }
   328→    }
   329→}
   330→
   331→@OptIn(ExperimentalFoundationApi::class)
   332→@Composable
   333→fun PdfCard(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity, selected: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, onLongClick: () -> Unit, onSyncCalendar: (() -> Unit)? = null) {
   334→    val dateFormat = remember { SimpleDateFormat("MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA) }
   335→    val borderColor = if (selected) CinnabarRed else MistGray
   336→    val bgColor = if (selected) CinnabarRed.copy(alpha = 0.06f) else WarmWhite
   337→    Surface(
   338→        modifier = Modifier
   339→            .fillMaxWidth()
   340→            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(6.dp))
   341→            .border(if (selected) 1.5.dp else 0.5.dp, borderColor, RoundedCornerShape(6.dp))
   342→            .combinedClickable(onClick = onClick, onLongClick = onLongClick),
   343→        color = bgColor,
   344→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp)
   345→    ) {
   346→        Column {
   347→            Row(
   348→                modifier = Modifier.padding(10.dp),
   349→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   350→            ) {
   351→                if (selected) {
   352→                    Checkbox(
   353→                        checked = true,
   354→                        onCheckedChange = { onLongClick() },
   355→                        modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp),
   356→                        colors = CheckboxDefaults.colors(checkedColor = CinnabarRed)
   357→                    )
   358→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(6.dp))
   359→                } else {
   360→                    Text(
   361→                        if (pdf.isSubpoena) "📋" else "📄",
   362→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge
   363→                    )
   364→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   365→                }
   366→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   367→                    Text(
   368→                        pdf.fileName,
   369→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   370→                        color = InkBlack,
   371→                        maxLines = 1,
   372→                        overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   373→                    )
   374→                    Text(
   375→                        "${dateFormat.format(Date(pdf.downloadedAt))} · ${formatSize(pdf.fileSize)}",
   376→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   377→                        color = CharcoalGray
   378→                    )
   379→                }
   380→                if (pdf.calendarEventId != null) {
   381→                    Text("已同步日历", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall, color = JadeGreen)
   382→                }
   383→            }
   384→            if (pdf.isSubpoena && pdf.calendarEventId == null && onSyncCalendar != null) {
   385→                Button(
   386→                    onClick = onSyncCalendar,
   387→                    modifier = Modifier
   388→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   389→                        .padding(start = 10.dp, end = 10.dp, bottom = 8.dp),
   390→                    colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   391→                        containerColor = AmberGold,
   392→                        contentColor = WarmWhite
   393→                    ),
   394→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp),
   395→                    contentPadding = PaddingValues(vertical = 6.dp)
   396→                ) {
   397→                    Icon(Icons.Default.DateRange, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp))
   398→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   399→                    Text("一键同步日历")
   400→                }
   401→            }
   402→        }
   403→    }
   404→}
   405→
   406→private fun formatSize(bytes: Long): String {
   407→    return when {
   408→        bytes < 1024 -> "${bytes}B"
   409→        bytes < 1024 * 1024 -> "${bytes / 1024}KB"
   410→        else -> String.format("%.1fMB", bytes / (1024.0 * 1024.0))
   411→    }
   412→}
   413→

1→package com.court.assistant.sms
     2→
     3→import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
     4→import java.util.*
     5→
     6→data class ParsedSms(
     7→    val caseNumber: String?,
     8→    val courtName: String?,
     9→    val hearingTime: Long?,
    10→    val partyNames: String?,
    11→    val webUrl: String?
    12→)
    13→
    14→class SmsParser {
    15→    // 案号: （2024）鲁1312民初1324号
    16→    private val caseNumberPattern = Regex("[（(]\\d{4}[）)][^\\s，。,\\.]+号")
    17→    // 法院名称: 【xxx法院】
    18→    private val courtPattern = Regex("【(.+?法院[）】]?)")
    19→    // 当事人: 】xxx你好 or 】xxx，你好
    20→    private val partyPattern = Regex("】(\\S+?)(?:你好|，你好|,你好)")
    21→    // URL
    22→    private val urlPattern = Regex("https?://[^\\s<>\"]+")
    23→    // 开庭时间 - 多种格式
    24→    private val datePatterns = listOf(
    25→        Regex("(\\d{4})年(\\d{1,2})月(\\d{1,2})日[\\s]*(\\d{1,2})[时点:：](\\d{0,2})[分]?"),
    26→        Regex("(\\d{4})-(\\d{1,2})-(\\d{1,2})[\\s]+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2})"),
    27→        Regex("(\\d{4})/(\\d{1,2})/(\\d{1,2})[\\s]+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2})")
    28→    )
    29→
    30→    fun parse(body: String): ParsedSms {
    31→        val caseNumber = caseNumberPattern.find(body)?.value
    32→        val courtFull = courtPattern.find(body)?.groupValues?.getOrNull(1)
    33→        val courtName = courtFull?.let { simplifyCourtName(it) }
    34→        val partyNames = partyPattern.find(body)?.groupValues?.getOrNull(1)
    35→        val webUrl = urlPattern.find(body)?.value
    36→        val hearingTime = parseHearingTime(body)
    37→
    38→        return ParsedSms(
    39→            caseNumber = caseNumber,
    40→            courtName = courtName,
    41→            hearingTime = hearingTime,
    42→            partyNames = partyNames,
    43→            webUrl = webUrl
    44→        )
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    private fun simplifyCourtName(name: String): String {
    48→        // 去掉省市前缀，保留区+法院
    49→        // "临沂市河东区人民法院" -> "河东区法院"
    50→        val cleaned = name.replace("】", "").replace("【", "")
    51→        val match = Regex("(\\S+?[区县市旗])人民法院").find(cleaned)
    52→        if (match != null) {
    53→            val district = match.groupValues[1]
    54→            // 取最后一个行政区划
    55→            val parts = Regex("[省市州盟]").split(district)
    56→            return "${parts.last()}法院"
    57→        }
    58→        return cleaned.replace("人民", "")
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    private fun parseHearingTime(text: String): Long? {
    62→        for (pattern in datePatterns) {
    63→            val match = pattern.find(text) ?: continue
    64→            try {
    65→                val year = match.groupValues[1].toInt()
    66→                val month = match.groupValues[2].toInt()
    67→                val day = match.groupValues[3].toInt()
    68→                val hour = match.groupValues[4].toInt()
    69→                val minute = match.groupValues.getOrNull(5)?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.toInt() ?: 0
    70→                val cal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
    71→                    clear()
    72→                    set(year, month - 1, day, hour, minute, 0)
    73→                }
    74→                return cal.timeInMillis
    75→            } catch (_: Exception) { continue }
    76→        }
    77→        return null
    78→    }
    79→}
    80→

1→package com.court.assistant.data.db
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import androidx.room.migration.Migration
     5→import androidx.sqlite.db.SupportSQLiteDatabase
     6→import androidx.room.*
     7→
     8→val MIGRATION_1_2 = object : Migration(1, 2) {
     9→    override fun migrate(database: SupportSQLiteDatabase) {
    10→        // 删除旧表并重建，添加 fileMd5 和 ocrTitle 列
    11→        database.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS pdf_documents")
    12→        database.execSQL("""
    13→            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pdf_documents (
    14→                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    15→                smsId INTEGER NOT NULL,
    16→                fileName TEXT NOT NULL,
    17→                filePath TEXT NOT NULL,
    18→                fileSize INTEGER NOT NULL,
    19→                fileMd5 TEXT NOT NULL,
    20→                ocrTitle TEXT,
    21→                downloadedAt INTEGER NOT NULL,
    22→                isSubpoena INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    23→                hearingInfo TEXT,
    24→                calendarEventId INTEGER,
    25→                FOREIGN KEY(smsId) REFERENCES court_sms(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    26→            )
    27→        """)
    28→        database.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_pdf_documents_smsId ON pdf_documents(smsId)")
    29→        database.execSQL("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_pdf_documents_fileMd5 ON pdf_documents(fileMd5)")
    30→    }
    31→}
    32→
    33→val MIGRATION_2_3 = object : Migration(2, 3) {
    34→    override fun migrate(database: SupportSQLiteDatabase) {
    35→        // 重建pdf_documents表，改为 smsId+fileMd5 联合唯一索引
    36→        database.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS pdf_documents")
    37→        database.execSQL("""
    38→            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pdf_documents (
    39→                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    40→                smsId INTEGER NOT NULL,
    41→                fileName TEXT NOT NULL,
    42→                filePath TEXT NOT NULL,
    43→                fileSize INTEGER NOT NULL,
    44→                fileMd5 TEXT NOT NULL,
    45→                ocrTitle TEXT,
    46→                downloadedAt INTEGER NOT NULL,
    47→                isSubpoena INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    48→                hearingInfo TEXT,
    49→                calendarEventId INTEGER,
    50→                FOREIGN KEY(smsId) REFERENCES court_sms(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    51→            )
    52→        """)
    53→        database.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_pdf_documents_smsId ON pdf_documents(smsId)")
    54→        database.execSQL("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_pdf_documents_smsId_fileMd5 ON pdf_documents(smsId, fileMd5)")
    55→    }
    56→}
    57→
    58→@Database(
    59→    entities = [CourtSmsEntity::class, PdfDocumentEntity::class],
    60→    version = 3,
    61→    exportSchema = false
    62→)
    63→abstract class CourtDatabase : RoomDatabase() {
    64→    abstract fun courtDao(): CourtDao
    65→
    66→    companion object {
    67→        @Volatile
    68→        private var INSTANCE: CourtDatabase? = null
    69→
    70→        fun getInstance(context: Context): CourtDatabase {
    71→            return INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
    72→                Room.databaseBuilder(
    73→                    context.applicationContext,
    74→                    CourtDatabase::class.java,
    75→                    "court_assistant.db"
    76→                )
    77→                .addMigrations(MIGRATION_1_2, MIGRATION_2_3)
    78→                .build().also { INSTANCE = it }
    79→            }
    80→        }
    81→    }
    82→}
    83→

1→package com.court.assistant.pdf
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.webkit.CookieManager
     5→import com.court.assistant.utils.Md5Util
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     8→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
     9→import okhttp3.Request
    10→import java.io.File
    11→
    12→class PdfDownloadManager(private val context: Context) {
    13→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    14→        .followRedirects(true)
    15→        .followSslRedirects(true)
    16→        .build()
    17→
    18→    fun getStorageDir(): File {
    19→        val dir = File(context.getExternalFilesDir(null), "Documents")
    20→        if (!dir.exists()) dir.mkdirs()
    21→        return dir
    22→    }
    23→
    24→    suspend fun download(url: String, fileName: String? = null, cookies: String? = null): DownloadResult = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    25→        try {
    26→            val requestBuilder = Request.Builder().url(url)
    27→            val cookie = cookies ?: CookieManager.getInstance()?.getCookie(url)
    28→            if (cookie != null) {
    29→                requestBuilder.addHeader("Cookie", cookie)
    30→            }
    31→            val response = client.newCall(requestBuilder.build()).execute()
    32→            if (!response.isSuccessful) return@withContext DownloadResult.Error("HTTP ${response.code}")
    33→
    34→            val contentDisposition = response.header("Content-Disposition")
    35→            val resolvedName = fileName
    36→                ?: parseFileNameFromDisposition(contentDisposition)
    37→                ?: "document_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.pdf"
    38→
    39→            // 只替换文件系统中真正不允许的字符，保留中文括号等
    40→            val safeName = resolvedName.replace(Regex("[/\\\\:*?\"<>|]"), "_")
    41→            val file = File(getStorageDir(), safeName)
    42→            response.body?.byteStream()?.use { input ->
    43→                file.outputStream().use { output -> input.copyTo(output) }
    44→            }
    45→
    46→            // 计算MD5用于去重
    47→            val md5 = Md5Util.calculateMd5(file)
    48→
    49→            DownloadResult.Success(file.absolutePath, safeName, file.length(), md5)
    50→        } catch (e: Exception) {
    51→            DownloadResult.Error(e.message ?: "Download failed")
    52→        }
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    private fun parseFileNameFromDisposition(header: String?): String? {
    56→        if (header == null) return null
    57→        // filename*=UTF-8''xxx.pdf
    58→        Regex("filename\\*=(?:UTF-8''|utf-8'')(.+)").find(header)?.let {
    59→            return java.net.URLDecoder.decode(it.groupValues[1], "UTF-8")
    60→        }
    61→        // filename="xxx.pdf"
    62→        Regex("filename=\"?([^\"]+)\"?").find(header)?.let {
    63→            return it.groupValues[1].trim()
    64→        }
    65→        return null
    66→    }
    67→}
    68→
    69→sealed class DownloadResult {
    70→    data class Success(
    71→        val filePath: String,
    72→        val fileName: String,
    73→        val fileSize: Long,
    74→        val fileMd5: String
    75→    ) : DownloadResult()
    76→    data class Error(val message: String) : DownloadResult()
    77→}
    78→

1→package com.court.assistant.sms
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.net.Uri
     5→import android.provider.Telephony
     6→
     7→data class RawSms(
     8→    val sender: String,
     9→    val body: String,
    10→    val date: Long
    11→)
    12→
    13→class SmsReader(private val context: Context) {
    14→    private val courtKeywords = listOf("法院", "开庭", "传票", "案件", "送达", "court.gov.cn", "案号")
    15→
    16→    fun readCourtSms(): List<RawSms> {
    17→        val smsList = mutableListOf<RawSms>()
    18→        val uri = Telephony.Sms.CONTENT_URI
    19→        val projection = arrayOf(
    20→            Telephony.Sms.ADDRESS,
    21→            Telephony.Sms.BODY,
    22→            Telephony.Sms.DATE
    23→        )
    24→        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(
    25→            uri, projection, null, null,
    26→            "${Telephony.Sms.DATE} DESC"
    27→        ) ?: return emptyList()
    28→
    29→        cursor.use {
    30→            val addrIdx = it.getColumnIndexOrThrow(Telephony.Sms.ADDRESS)
    31→            val bodyIdx = it.getColumnIndexOrThrow(Telephony.Sms.BODY)
    32→            val dateIdx = it.getColumnIndexOrThrow(Telephony.Sms.DATE)
    33→            while (it.moveToNext()) {
    34→                val body = it.getString(bodyIdx) ?: continue
    35→                if (courtKeywords.any { kw -> body.contains(kw) }) {
    36→                    smsList.add(RawSms(
    37→                        sender = it.getString(addrIdx) ?: "",
    38→                        body = body,
    39→                        date = it.getLong(dateIdx)
    40→                    ))
    41→                }
    42→            }
    43→        }
    44→        return smsList
    45→    }
    46→}
    47→

1→package com.court.assistant.calendar
     2→
     3→import android.content.ContentUris
     4→import android.content.ContentValues
     5→import android.content.Context
     6→import android.provider.CalendarContract
     7→import java.util.*
     8→
     9→class CalendarSync(private val context: Context) {
    10→
    11→    fun syncHearing(
    12→        caseNumber: String,
    13→        courtName: String?,
    14→        hearingTime: Long,
    15→        defendant: String?,        // 被传唤人
    16→        handler: String?,          // 承办人
    17→        location: String?,         // 应到处所
    18→        phone: String?,            // 电话
    19→        caseType: String? = null,  // 案由
    20→        partyNames: String? = null,
    21→        description: String? = null
    22→    ): Long? {
    23→        val calendarId = getOrCreateCalendarId() ?: return null
    24→        val timeFormat = java.text.SimpleDateFormat("MM/dd HH:mm", java.util.Locale.CHINA).apply {
    25→            timeZone = java.util.TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")
    26→        }
    27→        val title = buildString {
    28→            append(timeFormat.format(java.util.Date(hearingTime)))
    29→            if (location != null) append(" $location")
    30→            if (defendant != null) append(" $defendant")
    31→            if (phone != null) append(" $phone")
    32→            if (caseType != null) append(" $caseType")
    33→            append(" $caseNumber")
    34→        }
    35→
    36→        // 去重：案号+时间+当事人
    37→        if (eventExists(caseNumber, hearingTime, defendant)) return null
    38→        val desc = buildString {
    39→            val timeFormat = java.text.SimpleDateFormat("yyyy年MM月dd日 HH:mm", java.util.Locale.CHINA).apply {
    40→                timeZone = java.util.TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")
    41→            }
    42→            append("⏰ ${timeFormat.format(java.util.Date(hearingTime))}")
    43→            if (location != null) append("\n📍 $location")
    44→            append("\n\n案号: $caseNumber")
    45→            if (courtName != null) append("\n法院: $courtName")
    46→            if (defendant != null) append("\n被传唤人: $defendant")
    47→            if (handler != null) append("\n承办人: $handler")
    48→            if (phone != null) append("\n电话: $phone")
    49→            if (partyNames != null) append("\n当事人: $partyNames")
    50→            if (description != null) append("\n$description")
    51→        }
    52→
    53→        // 全天事件：取开庭日期在UTC时区的0点
    54→        val shanghaiCal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
    55→            timeInMillis = hearingTime
    56→        }
    57→        val utcCal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("UTC")).apply {
    58→            clear()
    59→            set(shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.YEAR), shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.MONTH), shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH), 0, 0, 0)
    60→        }
    61→        val dayStart = utcCal.timeInMillis
    62→        utcCal.add(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH, 1)
    63→        val dayEnd = utcCal.timeInMillis
    64→
    65→        val values = ContentValues().apply {
    66→            put(CalendarContract.Events.CALENDAR_ID, calendarId)
    67→            put(CalendarContract.Events.TITLE, title)
    68→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DESCRIPTION, desc)
    69→            put(CalendarContract.Events.ALL_DAY, 1)
    70→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART, dayStart)
    71→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DTEND, dayEnd)
    72→            put(CalendarContract.Events.EVENT_TIMEZONE, "UTC")
    73→            put(CalendarContract.Events.HAS_ALARM, 1)
    74→        }
    75→
    76→        val uri = context.contentResolver.insert(CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, values)
    77→        val eventId = uri?.let { ContentUris.parseId(it) }
    78→
    79→        // 添加提醒：提前1天和1小时
    80→        if (eventId != null) {
    81→            addReminder(eventId, 24 * 60) // 1天
    82→            addReminder(eventId, 60)       // 1小时
    83→        }
    84→        return eventId
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    private fun eventExists(caseNumber: String, hearingTime: Long, defendant: String?): Boolean {
    88→        val shanghaiCal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
    89→            timeInMillis = hearingTime
    90→        }
    91→        val utcCal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("UTC")).apply {
    92→            clear()
    93→            set(shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.YEAR), shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.MONTH), shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH), 0, 0, 0)
    94→        }
    95→        val dayStart = utcCal.timeInMillis
    96→        val projection = arrayOf(CalendarContract.Events._ID)
    97→        val selection: String
    98→        val args: Array<String>
    99→        if (defendant != null) {
   100→            selection = "${CalendarContract.Events.TITLE} LIKE ? AND ${CalendarContract.Events.TITLE} LIKE ? AND ${CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART} = ?"
   101→            args = arrayOf("%$caseNumber%", "%$defendant%", dayStart.toString())
   102→        } else {
   103→            selection = "${CalendarContract.Events.TITLE} LIKE ? AND ${CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART} = ?"
   104→            args = arrayOf("%$caseNumber%", dayStart.toString())
   105→        }
   106→        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(
   107→            CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, projection, selection, args, null
   108→        )
   109→        return cursor?.use { it.count > 0 } ?: false
   110→    }
   111→
   112→    private fun getOrCreateCalendarId(): Long? {
   113→        // 先查找已有日历
   114→        val projection = arrayOf(CalendarContract.Calendars._ID)
   115→        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(
   116→            CalendarContract.Calendars.CONTENT_URI, projection, null, null, null
   117→        )
   118→        cursor?.use {
   119→            if (it.moveToFirst()) return it.getLong(0)
   120→        }
   121→        return null // 使用系统默认日历
   122→    }
   123→
   124→    private fun addReminder(eventId: Long, minutes: Int) {
   125→        val values = ContentValues().apply {
   126→            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.EVENT_ID, eventId)
   127→            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.MINUTES, minutes)
   128→            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD, CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD_ALERT)
   129→        }
   130→        context.contentResolver.insert(CalendarContract.Reminders.CONTENT_URI, values)
   131→    }
   132→}
   133→

1→package com.court.assistant.pdf
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.graphics.Bitmap
     5→import android.graphics.pdf.PdfRenderer
     6→import android.os.ParcelFileDescriptor
     7→import com.google.mlkit.vision.common.InputImage
     8→import com.google.mlkit.vision.text.TextRecognition
     9→import com.google.mlkit.vision.text.chinese.ChineseTextRecognizerOptions
    10→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    11→import kotlinx.coroutines.suspendCancellableCoroutine
    12→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    13→import java.io.File
    14→import java.util.*
    15→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
    16→
    17→data class SubpoenaInfo(
    18→    val caseNumber: String?,       // 案号
    19→    val courtName: String?,       // 法院简称
    20→    val hearingTime: Long?,       // 应到时间
    21→    val defendant: String?,        // 被传唤人
    22→    val handler: String?,         // 承办人
    23→    val location: String?,        // 应到处所
    24→    val phone: String?,           // 电话
    25→    val caseType: String?         // 案由
    26→)
    27→
    28→class PdfParser(private val context: Context) {
    29→
    30→    suspend fun parseSubpoena(filePath: String): SubpoenaInfo? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    31→        val text = extractText(filePath)
    32→        if (text.isNullOrBlank()) return@withContext null
    33→        parseSubpoenaText(text)
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    private suspend fun extractText(filePath: String): String? {
    37→        // 先尝试 iText 提取
    38→        val iTextResult = extractWithIText(filePath)
    39→        if (!iTextResult.isNullOrBlank() && iTextResult.any { it.code > 0x4E00 }) {
    40→            return iTextResult
    41→        }
    42→        // 回退到 OCR
    43→        return extractWithOcr(filePath)
    44→    }
    45→
    46→    private fun extractWithIText(filePath: String): String? {
    47→        return try {
    48→            val reader = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.PdfReader(filePath)
    49→            val doc = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.PdfDocument(reader)
    50→            val sb = StringBuilder()
    51→            for (i in 1..doc.numberOfPages) {
    52→                val text = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.canvas.parser.PdfTextExtractor.getTextFromPage(doc.getPage(i))
    53→                sb.appendLine(text)
    54→            }
    55→            doc.close()
    56→            sb.toString()
    57→        } catch (_: Exception) { null }
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    private suspend fun extractWithOcr(filePath: String): String? {
    61→        val file = File(filePath)
    62→        if (!file.exists()) return null
    63→        val fd = ParcelFileDescriptor.open(file, ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY)
    64→        val renderer = PdfRenderer(fd)
    65→        val sb = StringBuilder()
    66→        val recognizer = TextRecognition.getClient(ChineseTextRecognizerOptions.Builder().build())
    67→
    68→        for (i in 0 until renderer.pageCount) {
    69→            val page = renderer.openPage(i)
    70→            val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(page.width * 2, page.height * 2, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)
    71→            page.render(bitmap, null, null, PdfRenderer.Page.RENDER_MODE_FOR_DISPLAY)
    72→            page.close()
    73→
    74→            val text = suspendCancellableCoroutine<String?> { cont ->
    75→                val image = InputImage.fromBitmap(bitmap, 0)
    76→                recognizer.process(image)
    77→                    .addOnSuccessListener { result -> cont.resume(result.text) }
    78→                    .addOnFailureListener { cont.resume(null) }
    79→            }
    80→            if (text != null) sb.appendLine(text)
    81→            bitmap.recycle()
    82→        }
    83→        renderer.close()
    84→        fd.close()
    85→        return sb.toString().takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    86→    }
    87→
    88→    private fun parseSubpoenaText(text: String): SubpoenaInfo {
    89→        val caseNumber = Regex("[（(]\\d{4}[）)][^\\s，。]+号").find(text)?.value
    90→        val courtName = Regex("(.+?法院)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)
    91→
    92→        // 提取被传唤人（优先提取"被传唤人"或"被告"）
    93→        val defendant = try {
    94→            // 优先匹配"被传唤人"
    95→            Regex("被传唤人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
    96→                // 其次匹配"被告"
    97→                ?: Regex("被告[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
    98→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
    99→
   100→        // 提取承办人（法官/审判员）
   101→        val handler = try {
   102→            listOf(
   103→                Regex("承办人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   104→                Regex("审判[长员][：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   105→                Regex("法官[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   106→                Regex("经办人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)")
   107→            ).firstNotNullOfOrNull { it.find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim() }
   108→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
   109→
   110→        // 提取联系电话（手机或固话）
   111→        val phonePattern = "([1][3-9]\\d{9}|0\\d{2,3}-?\\d{7,8})"
   112→        val phone = try {
   113→            listOf(
   114→                Regex("电话[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern"),
   115→                Regex("联系电话[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern"),
   116→                Regex("手机[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern"),
   117→                Regex("联系方式[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern"),
   118→                Regex("(?:tel|Tel|TEL)[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern")
   119→            ).firstNotNullOfOrNull { it.find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim() }
   120→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
   121→
   122→        val location = Regex("(?:应到处所|应到地点|地[点址])[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
   123→
   124→        var hearingTime: Long? = null
   125→        val timeMatch = Regex("(?:应到时间|开庭时间|定于)[：:]?\\s*(\\d{4})[年-](\\d{1,2})[月-](\\d{1,2})[日号]?[\\s]*(\\d{1,2})[时点:：](\\d{0,2})[分]?").find(text)
   126→        if (timeMatch != null) {
   127→            val hour = timeMatch.groupValues[4].toInt()
   128→            val minute = timeMatch.groupValues[5].takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.toInt() ?: 0
   129→            val cal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
   130→                clear()
   131→                set(timeMatch.groupValues[1].toInt(),
   132→                    timeMatch.groupValues[2].toInt() - 1,
   133→                    timeMatch.groupValues[3].toInt(),
   134→                    hour, minute, 0)
   135→            }
   136→            hearingTime = cal.timeInMillis
   137→        }
   138→
   139→        // 提取案由
   140→        val caseType = Regex("(?:案由|纠纷类型)[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
   141→
   142→        return SubpoenaInfo(caseNumber, courtName, hearingTime, defendant, handler, location, phone, caseType)
   143→    }
   144→}
   145→

     5→@Entity(
     6→    tableName = "pdf_documents",
     7→    foreignKeys = [ForeignKey(
     8→        entity = CourtSmsEntity::class,
     9→        parentColumns = ["id"],
    10→        childColumns = ["smsId"],
    11→        onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
    12→    )],

    19→    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    20→    val smsId: Long,
    21→    val fileName: String,           // 原始文件名
    22→    val filePath: String,

1→package com.court.assistant.data.db
     2→
     3→import androidx.room.*
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
     5→
     6→@Dao
     7→interface CourtDao {
     8→    @Query("SELECT * FROM court_sms ORDER BY receivedAt DESC")
     9→    fun getAllSms(): Flow<List<CourtSmsEntity>>
    10→
    11→    @Query("SELECT * FROM court_sms ORDER BY receivedAt DESC")
    12→    suspend fun getAllSmsList(): List<CourtSmsEntity>
    13→
    14→    @Query("SELECT * FROM court_sms WHERE id = :id")
    15→    suspend fun getSmsById(id: Long): CourtSmsEntity?
    16→
    17→    @Insert(onConflict = OnConflictStrategy.IGNORE)
    18→    suspend fun insertSms(sms: CourtSmsEntity): Long
    19→
    20→    @Update
    21→    suspend fun updateSms(sms: CourtSmsEntity)
    22→
    23→    @Query("SELECT * FROM pdf_documents WHERE smsId = :smsId ORDER BY downloadedAt")
    24→    fun getPdfsBySmsId(smsId: Long): Flow<List<PdfDocumentEntity>>
    25→
    26→    @Query("SELECT * FROM pdf_documents ORDER BY downloadedAt DESC")
    27→    fun getAllPdfs(): Flow<List<PdfDocumentEntity>>
    28→
    29→    @Insert(onConflict = OnConflictStrategy.IGNORE)
    30→    suspend fun insertPdf(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity): Long
    31→
    32→    @Update
    33→    suspend fun updatePdf(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity)
    34→
    35→    @Query("SELECT * FROM pdf_documents WHERE id = :id")
    36→    suspend fun getPdfById(id: Long): PdfDocumentEntity?
    37→
    38→    @Query("SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM court_sms WHERE bodyHash = :hash)")
    39→    suspend fun smsExists(hash: Int): Boolean
    40→
    41→    @Query("SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pdf_documents WHERE filePath = :filePath)")
    42→    suspend fun pdfExists(filePath: String): Boolean
    43→
    44→    @Query("SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pdf_documents WHERE fileMd5 = :md5)")
    45→    suspend fun pdfExistsByMd5(md5: String): Boolean
    46→
    47→    @Query("SELECT * FROM pdf_documents WHERE fileMd5 = :md5 LIMIT 1")
    48→    suspend fun getPdfByMd5(md5: String): PdfDocumentEntity?
    49→
    50→    @Query("SELECT id FROM pdf_documents WHERE filePath = :filePath LIMIT 1")
    51→    suspend fun getPdfIdByPath(filePath: String): Long?
    52→
    53→    @Query("DELETE FROM pdf_documents WHERE id = :id")
    54→    suspend fun deletePdf(id: Long)
    55→
    56→    @Query("DELETE FROM court_sms")
    57→    suspend fun clearAllSms()
    58→
    59→    @Query("DELETE FROM pdf_documents")
    60→    suspend fun clearAllPdfs()
    61→}
    62→

1→package com.court.assistant.data.repository
     2→
     3→import com.court.assistant.data.db.*
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
     5→
     6→class CourtRepository(private val dao: CourtDao) {
     7→    fun getAllSms(): Flow<List<CourtSmsEntity>> = dao.getAllSms()
     8→    suspend fun getAllSmsList(): List<CourtSmsEntity> = dao.getAllSmsList()
     9→    suspend fun getSmsById(id: Long) = dao.getSmsById(id)
    10→    suspend fun insertSms(sms: CourtSmsEntity) = dao.insertSms(sms)
    11→    suspend fun updateSms(sms: CourtSmsEntity) = dao.updateSms(sms)
    12→    fun getPdfsBySmsId(smsId: Long) = dao.getPdfsBySmsId(smsId)
    13→    fun getAllPdfs() = dao.getAllPdfs()
    14→    suspend fun insertPdf(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity) = dao.insertPdf(pdf)
    15→    suspend fun updatePdf(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity) = dao.updatePdf(pdf)
    16→    suspend fun getPdfById(id: Long) = dao.getPdfById(id)
    17→    suspend fun smsExists(hash: Int) = dao.smsExists(hash)
    18→    suspend fun pdfExists(filePath: String) = dao.pdfExists(filePath)
    19→    suspend fun pdfExistsByMd5(md5: String) = dao.pdfExistsByMd5(md5)
    20→    suspend fun getPdfByMd5(md5: String) = dao.getPdfByMd5(md5)
    21→    suspend fun deletePdf(id: Long) = dao.deletePdf(id)
    22→    suspend fun clearAllSms() = dao.clearAllSms()
    23→    suspend fun clearAllPdfs() = dao.clearAllPdfs()
    24→    suspend fun clearAllData() {
    25→        clearAllPdfs()
    26→        clearAllSms()
    27→    }
    28→}
    29→

1→package com.court.assistant.ui
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
     4→import androidx.navigation.NavType
     5→import androidx.navigation.compose.NavHost
     6→import androidx.navigation.compose.composable
     7→import androidx.navigation.compose.rememberNavController
     8→import androidx.navigation.navArgument
     9→import com.court.assistant.viewmodel.MainViewModel
    10→
    11→@Composable
    12→fun Navigation(viewModel: MainViewModel) {
    13→    val navController = rememberNavController()
    14→
    15→    NavHost(navController = navController, startDestination = "main") {
    16→        composable("main") {
    17→            MainScreen(
    18→                viewModel = viewModel,
    19→                onOpenWebView = { smsId, url ->
    20→                    navController.navigate("webview/$smsId/${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(url, "UTF-8")}")
    21→                },
    22→                onOpenPdf = { pdfId ->
    23→                    navController.navigate("pdf/$pdfId")
    24→                }
    25→            )
    26→        }
    27→        composable(
    28→            "webview/{smsId}/{url}",
    29→            arguments = listOf(
    30→                navArgument("smsId") { type = NavType.LongType },
    31→                navArgument("url") { type = NavType.StringType }
    32→            )
    33→        ) { entry ->
    34→            val smsId = entry.arguments?.getLong("smsId") ?: return@composable
    35→            val url = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(entry.arguments?.getString("url") ?: "", "UTF-8")
    36→            WebViewScreen(
    37→                viewModel = viewModel,
    38→                smsId = smsId,
    39→                url = url,
    40→                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
    41→            )
    42→        }
    43→        composable(
    44→            "pdf/{pdfId}",
    45→            arguments = listOf(navArgument("pdfId") { type = NavType.LongType })
    46→        ) { entry ->
    47→            val pdfId = entry.arguments?.getLong("pdfId") ?: return@composable
    48→            PdfPreviewScreen(
    49→                viewModel = viewModel,
    50→                pdfId = pdfId,
    51→                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
    52→            )
    53→        }
    54→    }
    55→}
    56→

1→package com.court.assistant.ui
     2→
     3→import android.graphics.Bitmap
     4→import android.graphics.pdf.PdfRenderer
     5→import android.os.ParcelFileDescriptor
     6→import androidx.compose.foundation.*
     7→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
     8→import androidx.compose.foundation.shape.RoundedCornerShape
     9→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
    10→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.ArrowBack
    11→import androidx.compose.material3.*
    12→import androidx.compose.runtime.*
    13→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    15→import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.asImageBitmap
    16→import androidx.compose.ui.layout.ContentScale
    17→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    18→import com.court.assistant.data.db.PdfDocumentEntity
    19→import com.court.assistant.ui.theme.*
    20→import com.court.assistant.viewmodel.MainViewModel
    21→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    22→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    23→import java.io.File
    24→
    25→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    26→@Composable
    27→fun PdfPreviewScreen(
    28→    viewModel: MainViewModel,
    29→    pdfId: Long,
    30→    onBack: () -> Unit
    31→) {
    32→    var pdf by remember { mutableStateOf<PdfDocumentEntity?>(null) }
    33→    var pages by remember { mutableStateOf<List<Bitmap>>(emptyList()) }
    34→    var error by remember { mutableStateOf<String?>(null) }
    35→
    36→    LaunchedEffect(pdfId) {
    37→        val doc = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    38→            val app = viewModel.getApplication<com.court.assistant.CourtApp>()
    39→            app.repository.getPdfById(pdfId)
    40→        }
    41→        pdf = doc
    42→        if (doc != null) {
    43→            try {
    44→                pages = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) { renderPdfPages(doc.filePath) }
    45→            } catch (e: Exception) {
    46→                error = "无法预览: ${e.message}"
    47→            }
    48→        }
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    Scaffold(
    52→        topBar = {
    53→            TopAppBar(
    54→                title = {
    55→                    Text(
    56→                        pdf?.fileName ?: "文书预览",
    57→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
    58→                        maxLines = 1
    59→                    )
    60→                },
    61→                navigationIcon = {
    62→                    IconButton(onClick = onBack) {
    63→                        Icon(Icons.Default.ArrowBack, contentDescription = "返回")
    64→                    }
    65→                },
    66→                colors = TopAppBarDefaults.topAppBarColors(
    67→                    containerColor = Ivory,
    68→                    titleContentColor = InkBlack
    69→                )
    70→            )
    71→        }
    72→    ) { padding ->
    73→        Column(
    74→            modifier = Modifier
    75→                .fillMaxSize()
    76→                .padding(padding)
    77→                .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
    78→        ) {
    79→            // 开庭信息卡片（如果是传票）
    80→            pdf?.hearingInfo?.let { info ->
    81→                Card(
    82→                    modifier = Modifier
    83→                        .fillMaxWidth()
    84→                        .padding(12.dp),
    85→                    colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = CinnabarRed.copy(alpha = 0.08f)),
    86→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(8.dp)
    87→                ) {
    88→                    Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)) {
    89→                        Text(
    90→                            "📋 开庭信息",
    91→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    92→                            color = CinnabarRed
    93→                        )
    94→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
    95→                        Text(
    96→                            info,
    97→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
    98→                            color = InkBlack
    99→                        )
   100→                        if (pdf?.calendarEventId != null) {
   101→                            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   102→                            Text(
   103→                                "✅ 已同步到系统日历",
   104→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   105→                                color = JadeGreen
   106→                            )
   107→                        }
   108→                    }
   109→                }
   110→            }
   111→
   112→            if (error != null) {
   113→                Text(
   114→                    error!!,
   115→                    color = CinnabarRed,
   116→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp)
   117→                )
   118→            }
   119→
   120→            // PDF 页面渲染
   121→            pages.forEachIndexed { index, bitmap ->
   122→                Image(
   123→                    bitmap = bitmap.asImageBitmap(),
   124→                    contentDescription = "第 ${index + 1} 页",
   125→                    modifier = Modifier
   126→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   127→                        .padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
   128→                    contentScale = ContentScale.FillWidth
   129→                )
   130→            }
   131→
   132→            if (pages.isEmpty() && error == null) {
   133→                CircularProgressIndicator(
   134→                    modifier = Modifier
   135→                        .align(Alignment.CenterHorizontally)
   136→                        .padding(32.dp),
   137→                    color = CinnabarRed
   138→                )
   139→            }
   140→        }
   141→    }
   142→}
   143→
   144→private fun renderPdfPages(filePath: String): List<Bitmap> {
   145→    val file = File(filePath)
   146→    if (!file.exists()) return emptyList()
   147→    val fd = ParcelFileDescriptor.open(file, ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY)
   148→    val renderer = PdfRenderer(fd)
   149→    val bitmaps = mutableListOf<Bitmap>()
   150→    for (i in 0 until renderer.pageCount) {
   151→        val page = renderer.openPage(i)
   152→        val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(page.width * 2, page.height * 2, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)
   153→        page.render(bitmap, null, null, PdfRenderer.Page.RENDER_MODE_FOR_DISPLAY)
   154→        page.close()
   155→        bitmaps.add(bitmap)
   156→    }
   157→    renderer.close()
   158→    fd.close()
   159→    return bitmaps
   160→}
   161→

content.text:
Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the CourtAssistant project. Let me provide you with a complete summary:

## CourtAssistant Project Overview

### Overall Directory Structure

```
C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\
├── app/
│   ├── src/main/
│   │   ├── java/com/court/assistant/
│   │   │   ├── CourtApp.kt (Application class)
│   │   │   ├── MainActivity.kt (Entry point)
│   │   │   ├── data/
│   │   │   │   ├── db/ (Database entities & DAOs)
│   │   │   │   │   ├── CourtSmsEntity.kt
│   │   │   │   │   ├── PdfDocumentEntity.kt
│   │   │   │   │   ├── CourtDatabase.kt
│   │   │   │   │   └── CourtDao.kt
│   │   │   │   └── repository/
│   │   │   │       └── CourtRepository.kt
│   │   │   ├── sms/
│   │   │   │   ├── SmsReader.kt (Reads SMS from device)
│   │   │   │   └── SmsParser.kt (Parses court SMS content)
│   │   │   ├── pdf/
│   │   │   │   ├── PdfDownloadManager.kt (Downloads PDFs)
│   │   │   │   └── PdfParser.kt (Extracts text via iText & ML Kit OCR)
│   │   │   ├── calendar/
│   │   │   │   └── CalendarSync.kt (Syncs to system calendar)
│   │   │   ├── webview/
│   │   │   │   └── CourtWebViewClient.kt (Intercepts PDF downloads)
│   │   │   ├── ui/
│   │   │   │   ├── MainScreen.kt (SMS list with expandable cards)
│   │   │   │   ├── WebViewScreen.kt (Document delivery portal)
│   │   │   │   ├── PdfPreviewScreen.kt (PDF viewer)
│   │   │   │   ├── Navigation.kt (Compose navigation)
│   │   │   │   └── theme/
│   │   │   │       ├── Theme.kt (Chinese aesthetic colors)
│   │   │   │       └── Type.kt (Typography)
│   │   │   ├── viewmodel/
│   │   │   │   └── MainViewModel.kt (State management)
│   │   │   └── utils/
│   │   │       └── Md5Util.kt
│   │   ├── res/ (Resources)
│   │   │   ├── values/
│   │   │   │   ├── strings.xml
│   │   │   │   └── themes.xml
│   │   │   └── mipmap/ (App icons)
│   │   └── AndroidManifest.xml
│   ├── build.gradle.kts
│   └── proguard-rules.pro
├── build.gradle.kts
├── settings.gradle.kts
├── gradle.properties
├── gradlew.bat
└── .gitignore
```

### What the Application Does

**CourtAssistant** is an Android app designed to help lawyers and litigants manage court documents and hearing schedules. It's written in Kotlin using Jetpack Compose with a Chinese aesthetic design.

**Core Functionality:**

1. **SMS Reading & Parsing**
   - Reads SMS messages from the device containing court-related keywords ("法院", "开庭", "传票", etc.)
   - Parses SMS content using regex patterns to extract:
     - Case number (案号)
     - Court name (法院名称)
     - Hearing time (开庭时间)
     - Party names (当事人)
     - Document delivery URLs

2. **PDF Document Management**
   - Downloads PDF documents from court delivery portals via WebView
   - Stores PDFs locally with MD5 deduplication
   - Extracts text from PDFs using:
     - iText7 for text-based PDFs
     - ML Kit Chinese OCR for scanned documents
   - Parses subpoena information (hearing time, location, defendant, handler, phone)

3. **Calendar Integration**
   - Automatically syncs hearing dates to the system calendar
   - Creates all-day events with detailed descriptions
   - Adds reminders (1 day and 1 hour before hearing)
   - Prevents duplicate events using case number + hearing time + defendant

4. **UI Features**
   - Main screen displays SMS records in expandable cards
   - Shows court name, case number, party names, and hearing time
   - Displays associated PDF documents
   - WebView screen for accessing court document delivery portals
   - PDF preview screen with rendered pages
   - Multi-select PDF sharing (individual or zipped)
   - One-click calendar sync for subpoenas

5. **Data Persistence**
   - Room database (SQLite) with two main tables:
     - `court_sms`: Stores parsed SMS records
     - `pdf_documents`: Stores downloaded PDFs with metadata
   - Foreign key relationships with cascade delete
   - Unique indices on body hash and (smsId, fileMd5)

### Key Technologies

- **UI Framework**: Jetpack Compose with Material3
- **Database**: Room ORM with SQLite
- **PDF Processing**: iText7 + ML Kit Chinese OCR
- **Networking**: OkHttp3
- **WebView**: Android WebView with custom client for PDF interception
- **Coroutines**: Kotlin coroutines for async operations
- **Navigation**: Compose Navigation
- **Calendar**: Android CalendarContract API

### Permissions Required

- `READ_SMS` / `RECEIVE_SMS` - Read court SMS messages
- `READ_CALENDAR` / `WRITE_CALENDAR` - Sync hearing dates
- `INTERNET` - Download documents
- `WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` (API ≤28) / `READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` (API ≤32)
- `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` (API ≥13)

### Design Theme

Uses "宋氏美学" (Song Dynasty aesthetic) with a traditional Chinese color palette:
- Ivory (#FFF8F0) - Main background
- Cinnabar Red (#C04851) - Accent color
- Ink Black (#2C2C2C) - Text
- Jade Green (#5B8C5A) - Success indicators
- Amber Gold (#D4A843) - Warnings

### Build Configuration

- **Target SDK**: 34 (Android 14)
- **Min SDK**: 26 (Android 8.0)
- **Kotlin**: 1.9.22
- **Compose BOM**: 2024.02.00
- **Java**: Version 17

The app is production-ready with signing configuration for release builds and includes database migrations for schema evolution.

好的，以下用中文来介绍这个项目。

## CourtAssistant — 法院助手

这是一个 Android 应用，主要面向律师和当事人，帮助管理法院文书和开庭日程。使用 Kotlin + Jetpack Compose 开发，采用宋式美学的中国风配色。

### 核心功能

1. **短信读取与解析** — 自动读取手机中包含"法院"、"开庭"、"传票"等关键词的短信，用正则提取案号、法院名称、开庭时间、当事人、文书送达链接等信息。

2. **PDF 文书管理** — 通过 WebView 访问法院送达平台，下载 PDF 文书并本地存储（MD5 去重）。支持 iText7 提取文字型 PDF 内容，以及 ML Kit 中文 OCR 识别扫描件，从传票中解析开庭时间、地点、被告、承办人、电话等。

3. **日历同步** — 将开庭日期自动同步到系统日历，创建全天事件并设置提前 1 天和 1 小时的提醒，通过案号+开庭时间+被告防止重复。

4. **UI 界面**
   - 主页：短信记录列表，可展开卡片查看详情和关联 PDF
   - WebView 页：访问法院文书送达门户
   - PDF 预览页：渲染查看 PDF
   - 支持多选 PDF 分享（单个或打包 zip）

### 项目结构

```
app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/
├── sms/          # 短信读取与解析
├── pdf/          # PDF 下载与解析（iText7 + OCR）
├── calendar/     # 系统日历同步
├── data/db/      # Room 数据库（court_sms、pdf_documents 两张表）
├── ui/           # Compose UI 界面
├── viewmodel/    # 状态管理
├── webview/      # WebView 拦截 PDF 下载
└── utils/        # 工具类（MD5）
```

### 技术栈

- Jetpack Compose + Material3、Room 数据库、OkHttp3、iText7 + ML Kit OCR、Kotlin 协程
- 最低支持 Android 8.0 (API 26)，目标 SDK 34 (Android 14)

### 设计风格

宋式美学配色：象牙白 `#FFF8F0`、朱砂红 `#C04851`、墨黑 `#2C2C2C`、玉绿 `#5B8C5A`、琥珀金 `#D4A843`。

总的来说，这是一个实用的法律工作辅助工具，自动化处理法院短信→文书下载→日程提醒的完整流程。后续有什么需要修改或了解的，直接说就行。

message.content: 1、主界面字体再大些，字体颜色更深黑色更黑，更清晰；2、有的两个短信相邻时间发送，接收主体不一致，但短息内容中链接网页上的pdf文件名称一致，结果用户君点击下载完成，界面上的那个同一个pdf文件卡片在不同菜单栏下面出现了。

package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

// 宋氏美学配色 - 素雅中式风格
val Ivory = Color(0xFFFFF8F0)          // 米白底色
val WarmWhite = Color(0xFFFFFDF5)      // 暖白
val InkBlack = Color(0xFF2C2C2C)       // 墨色文字
val CharcoalGray = Color(0xFF4A4A4A)   // 深灰
val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFFC04851)    // 朱红点缀
val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFE8939A)  // 浅朱红
val MistGray = Color(0xFFE8E4DF)       // 雾灰分割线
val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFF5F0E8)    // 羊皮纸背景
val JadeGreen = Color(0xFF5B8C5A)      // 玉绿（成功色）
val AmberGold = Color(0xFFD4A843)      // 琥珀金

private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = CinnabarRed,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.3f),
    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    background = Ivory,
    onBackground = InkBlack,
    surface = WarmWhite,
    onSurface = InkBlack,
    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    outline = MistGray,
    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
)

@Composable
fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
        typography = CourtTypography,
        content = content
    )
}

package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.Typography
import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontFamily
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

val CourtTypography = Typography(
    headlineLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 28.sp,
        letterSpacing = 2.sp
    ),
    headlineMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = 22.sp,
        letterSpacing = 1.sp
    ),
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 18.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    titleMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 15.sp
    ),
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 15.sp,
        lineHeight = 24.sp
    ),
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        lineHeight = 20.sp
    ),
    labelLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 13.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontSize = 11.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
)

1→package com.court.assistant.ui

     3→import androidx.compose.animation.*
