    34→
    35→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    36→@Composable
    37→fun MainScreen(
    38→    viewModel: MainViewModel,
    39→    onOpenWebView: (smsId: Long, url: String) -> Unit,
    40→    onOpenPdf: (pdfId: Long) -> Unit
    41→) {
    42→    val state by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    43→    val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
    44→    var showClearDialog by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    45→
    46→    if (showClearDialog) {
    47→        AlertDialog(
    48→            onDismissRequest = { showClearDialog = false },
    49→            title = { Text("清除所有数据") },
    50→            text = { Text("将清除所有短信记录和已下载的文书，确认清除？") },
    51→            confirmButton = {
    52→                TextButton(onClick = {
    53→                    showClearDialog = false
    54→                    viewModel.clearAllData()
    55→                }) { Text("确认清除", color = CinnabarRed) }
    56→            },
    57→            dismissButton = {
    58→                TextButton(onClick = { showClearDialog = false }) { Text("取消") }
    59→            }
    60→        )
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    LaunchedEffect(state.message) {
    64→        state.message?.let {
    65→            snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(it)
    66→            viewModel.clearMessage()
    67→        }
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    Scaffold(
    71→        snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) },
    72→        topBar = {
    73→            TopAppBar(
    74→                title = {
    75→                    Text("诉讼日程助手", style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium)
    76→                },
    77→                actions = {
    78→                    IconButton(onClick = { viewModel.syncAllToCalendar() }) {
    79→                        Icon(Icons.Default.DateRange, contentDescription = "同步日程")
    80→                    }
    81→                    IconButton(onClick = { viewModel.loadSms() }) {
    82→                        Icon(Icons.Default.Refresh, contentDescription = "刷新短信")
    83→                    }
    84→                    IconButton(onClick = { showClearDialog = true }) {
    85→                        Icon(Icons.Default.Delete, contentDescription = "清除数据")
    86→                    }
    87→                },
    88→                colors = TopAppBarDefaults.topAppBarColors(
    89→                    containerColor = Ivory,
    90→                    titleContentColor = InkBlack
    91→                )
    92→            )
    93→        },
    94→        bottomBar = {
    95→            Surface(
    96→                color = ParchmentBg,
    97→                tonalElevation = 0.dp
    98→            ) {
    99→                Text(
   100→                    text = "宋式美学，单夫纯律师制作保留权利",
   101→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   102→                    color = CharcoalGray.copy(alpha = 0.6f),
   103→                    modifier = Modifier
   104→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   105→                        .padding(vertical = 8.dp, horizontal = 16.dp)
   106→                )
   107→            }
   108→        }
   109→    ) { padding ->
   110→        Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize().padding(padding)) {
   111→            if (state.loading) {
   112→                CircularProgressIndicator(
   113→                    modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.Center),
   114→                    color = CinnabarRed
   115→                )
   116→            } else if (state.smsWithPdfs.isEmpty()) {
   117→                Text(
   118→                    "暂无法院短信\n点击右上角刷新读取",
   119→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   120→                    color = CharcoalGray,
   121→                    modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.Center)
   122→                )
   123→            } else {
   124→                LazyColumn(
   125→                    modifier = Modifier
   126→                        .fillMaxSize()
   127→                        .background(MistGray),
   128→                    contentPadding = PaddingValues(12.dp),
   129→                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)
   130→                ) {
   131→                    items(state.smsWithPdfs, key = { it.sms.id }) { item ->
   132→                        SmsMenuCard(
   133→                            item = item,
   134→                            onOpenWebView = onOpenWebView,
   135→                            onOpenPdf = onOpenPdf,
   136→                            onSharePdfs = { viewModel.sharePdfs(it) },
   137→                            onSyncCalendar = { viewModel.syncPdfToCalendar(it) }
   138→                        )
   139→                    }
   140→                }
   141→            }
   142→        }
   143→    }
   144→}
   145→
   146→@Composable
   147→fun SmsMenuCard(
   148→    item: SmsWithPdfs,
   149→    onOpenWebView: (smsId: Long, url: String) -> Unit,
   150→    onOpenPdf: (pdfId: Long) -> Unit,
   151→    onSharePdfs: (List<Long>) -> Unit,
   152→    onSyncCalendar: (Long) -> Unit
   153→) {
   154→    var expanded by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
   155→    val selectedIds = remember { mutableStateListOf<Long>() }
   156→    val dateFormat = remember { SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA) }
   157→
   158→    // 清除选中状态当收缩时
   159→    if (!expanded) selectedIds.clear()
   160→
   161→    Card(
   162→        modifier = Modifier
   163→            .fillMaxWidth()
   164→            .border(1.dp, MistGray, RoundedCornerShape(8.dp)),
   165→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(8.dp),
   166→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = WarmWhite),
   167→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 3.dp)
   168→    ) {
   169→        Column {
   170→            // 头部 - 浅米色背景
   171→            Row(
   172→                modifier = Modifier
   173→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   174→                    .background(Ivory)
   175→                    .clickable { expanded = !expanded }
   176→                    .padding(16.dp),
   177→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   178→            ) {
   179→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   180→                    // 当事人（醒目）
   181→                    item.sms.partyNames?.let {
   182→                        Text(
   183→                            it,
   184→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   185→                            color = CinnabarRed
   186→                        )
   187→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(6.dp))
   188→                    }
   189→                    // 法院 + 案号
   190→                    Row(
   191→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   192→                        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   193→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   194→                    ) {
   195→                        item.sms.courtName?.let {
   196→                            Text(
   197→                                it,
   198→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   199→                                color = InkBlack
   200→                            )
   201→                        }
   202→                        item.sms.caseNumber?.let {
   203→                            Text(
   204→                                it,
   205→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   206→                                color = CharcoalGray,
   207→                                maxLines = 1,
   208→                                overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   209→                            )
   210→                        }
   211→                    }
   212→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(6.dp))
   213→                    // 时间 + 发送者
   214→                    Text(
   215→                        "${dateFormat.format(Date(item.sms.receivedAt))}  ${item.sms.sender}",
   216→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   217→                        color = CharcoalGray
   218→                    )
   219→                    // 文书提示
   220→                    if (item.sms.webUrl != null && item.pdfs.isEmpty()) {
   221→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(6.dp))
   222→                        Text(
   223→                            "点击展开查看文书",
   224→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   225→                            color = AmberGold
   226→                        )
   227→                    }
   228→                    if (item.pdfs.isNotEmpty()) {
   229→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   230→                        Text(
   231→                            "${item.pdfs.size} 个文书",
   232→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   233→                            color = JadeGreen
   234→                        )
   235→                    }
   236→                }
   237→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   238→                Icon(
   239→                    if (expanded) Icons.Default.KeyboardArrowUp else Icons.Default.KeyboardArrowDown,
   240→                    contentDescription = null,
   241→                    tint = CharcoalGray
   242→                )
   243→            }
   244→
   245→            AnimatedVisibility(visible = expanded) {
   246→                Column(
   247→                    modifier = Modifier
   248→                        .background(ParchmentBg)
   249→                        .padding(start = 12.dp, end = 12.dp, bottom = 12.dp, top = 8.dp),
   250→                    verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   251→                ) {
   252→                    if (item.sms.webUrl != null) {
   253→                        if (item.pdfs.isEmpty()) {
   254→                            Button(
   255→                                onClick = { onOpenWebView(item.sms.id, item.sms.webUrl!!) },
   256→                                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   257→                                colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   258→                                    containerColor = CinnabarRed,
   259→                                    contentColor = WarmWhite
   260→                                ),
   261→                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp)
   262→                            ) {
   263→                                Text("打开送达链接下载文书")
   264→                            }
   265→                        } else {
   266→                            OutlinedButton(
   267→                                onClick = { onOpenWebView(item.sms.id, item.sms.webUrl!!) },
   268→                                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   269→                                colors = ButtonDefaults.outlinedButtonColors(contentColor = CharcoalGray),
   270→                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp)
   271→                            ) {
   272→                                Text("继续下载文书")
   273→                            }
   274→                        }
   275→                    }
   276→                    item.pdfs.forEach { pdf ->
   277→                        val selected = pdf.id in selectedIds
   278→                        PdfCard(
   279→                            pdf = pdf,
   280→                            selected = selected,
   281→                            onClick = {
   282→                                if (selectedIds.isNotEmpty()) {
   283→                                    if (selected) selectedIds.remove(pdf.id) else selectedIds.add(pdf.id)
   284→                                } else {
   285→                                    onOpenPdf(pdf.id)
   286→                                }
   287→                            },
   288→                            onLongClick = {
   289→                                if (selected) selectedIds.remove(pdf.id) else selectedIds.add(pdf.id)
   290→                            },
   291→                            onSyncCalendar = { onSyncCalendar(pdf.id) }
   292→                        )
   293→                    }
   294→                    // 分享按钮
   295→                    if (item.pdfs.isNotEmpty()) {
   296→                        Row(
   297→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   298→                            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.End,
   299→                            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   300→                        ) {
   301→                            if (selectedIds.isNotEmpty()) {
   302→                                Text(
   303→                                    "已选 ${selectedIds.size} 个",
   304→                                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   305→                                    color = CharcoalGray
   306→                                )
   307→                                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   308→                            }
   309→                            FilledTonalButton(
   310→                                onClick = {
   311→                                    val ids = if (selectedIds.isNotEmpty()) selectedIds.toList()
   312→                                              else item.pdfs.map { it.id }
   313→                                    onSharePdfs(ids)
   314→                                },
   315→                                colors = ButtonDefaults.filledTonalButtonColors(
   316→                                    containerColor = JadeGreen.copy(alpha = 0.15f),
   317→                                    contentColor = JadeGreen
   318→                                ),
   319→                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp),
   320→                                contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 6.dp)
   321→                            ) {
   322→                                Icon(Icons.Default.Share, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp))
   323→                                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   324→                                Text(if (selectedIds.isNotEmpty()) "分享选中" else "分享全部")
   325→                            }
   326→                        }
   327→                    }
   328→                }
   329→            }
   330→        }
   331→    }
   332→}
   333→
   334→@OptIn(ExperimentalFoundationApi::class)
   335→@Composable
   336→fun PdfCard(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity, selected: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, onLongClick: () -> Unit, onSyncCalendar: (() -> Unit)? = null) {
   337→    val dateFormat = remember { SimpleDateFormat("MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA) }
   338→    val borderColor = if (selected) CinnabarRed else MistGray
   339→    val bgColor = if (selected) CinnabarRed.copy(alpha = 0.06f) else WarmWhite
   340→    Surface(
   341→        modifier = Modifier
   342→            .fillMaxWidth()
   343→            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(6.dp))
   344→            .border(if (selected) 1.5.dp else 0.5.dp, borderColor, RoundedCornerShape(6.dp))
   345→            .combinedClickable(onClick = onClick, onLongClick = onLongClick),
   346→        color = bgColor,
   347→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp)
   348→    ) {
   349→        Column {
   350→            Row(
   351→                modifier = Modifier.padding(10.dp),
   352→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   353→            ) {
   354→                if (selected) {
   355→                    Checkbox(
   356→                        checked = true,
   357→                        onCheckedChange = { onLongClick() },
   358→                        modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp),
   359→                        colors = CheckboxDefaults.colors(checkedColor = CinnabarRed)
   360→                    )
   361→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(6.dp))
   362→                } else {
   363→                    Text(
   364→                        if (pdf.isSubpoena) "📋" else "📄",
   365→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge
   366→                    )
   367→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   368→                }
   369→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   370→                    Text(
   371→                        pdf.fileName,
   372→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   373→                        color = InkBlack,
   374→                        maxLines = 1,
   375→                        overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   376→                    )
   377→                    Text(
   378→                        "${dateFormat.format(Date(pdf.downloadedAt))} · ${formatSize(pdf.fileSize)}",
   379→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   380→                        color = CharcoalGray
   381→                    )
   382→                }
   383→                if (pdf.calendarEventId != null) {
   384→                    Text("已同步日历", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall, color = JadeGreen)
   385→                }
   386→            }
   387→            if (pdf.isSubpoena && pdf.calendarEventId == null && onSyncCalendar != null) {
   388→                Button(
   389→                    onClick = onSyncCalendar,
   390→                    modifier = Modifier
   391→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   392→                        .padding(start = 10.dp, end = 10.dp, bottom = 8.dp),
   393→                    colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   394→                        containerColor = AmberGold,
   395→                        contentColor = WarmWhite
   396→                    ),
   397→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp),
   398→                    contentPadding = PaddingValues(vertical = 6.dp)
   399→                ) {
   400→                    Icon(Icons.Default.DateRange, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp))
   401→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   402→                    Text("一键同步日历")
   403→                }
   404→            }
   405→        }
   406→    }
   407→}
   408→
   409→private fun formatSize(bytes: Long): String {
   410→    return when {
   411→        bytes < 1024 -> "${bytes}B"
   412→        bytes < 1024 * 1024 -> "${bytes / 1024}KB"
   413→        else -> String.format("%.1fMB", bytes / (1024.0 * 1024.0))
   414→    }
   415→}
   416→

Explore the CourtAssistant project at C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant to understand:

1. Read the full MainScreen.kt to understand the SmsMenuCard layout, especially how PDF cards with hearing info (isSubpoena, hearingTime) are displayed
2. Read the full Navigation.kt to understand how to add a new route
3. Read Type.kt and Theme.kt to understand current typography setup
4. Read MainViewModel.kt to understand how hearingTime is available in the UI state (SmsWithPdfs)
5. Check if there's any existing SharedPreferences or DataStore usage in the project
6. Look at PdfDocumentEntity to understand hearingInfo and hearingTime fields

I need to understand:
- How hearingTime flows from SMS/PDF to the UI card
- The current navigation structure for adding a settings page
- How to calculate "周二-3日后14:30" style countdown from hearingTime

content.content:
1→package com.court.assistant.ui
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
     4→import androidx.navigation.NavType
     5→import androidx.navigation.compose.NavHost
     6→import androidx.navigation.compose.composable
     7→import androidx.navigation.compose.rememberNavController
     8→import androidx.navigation.navArgument
     9→import com.court.assistant.viewmodel.MainViewModel
    10→
    11→@Composable
    12→fun Navigation(viewModel: MainViewModel) {
    13→    val navController = rememberNavController()
    14→
    15→    NavHost(navController = navController, startDestination = "main") {
    16→        composable("main") {
    17→            MainScreen(
    18→                viewModel = viewModel,
    19→                onOpenWebView = { smsId, url ->
    20→                    navController.navigate("webview/$smsId/${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(url, "UTF-8")}")
    21→                },
    22→                onOpenPdf = { pdfId ->
    23→                    navController.navigate("pdf/$pdfId")
    24→                }
    25→            )
    26→        }
    27→        composable(
    28→            "webview/{smsId}/{url}",
    29→            arguments = listOf(
    30→                navArgument("smsId") { type = NavType.LongType },
    31→                navArgument("url") { type = NavType.StringType }
    32→            )
    33→        ) { entry ->
    34→            val smsId = entry.arguments?.getLong("smsId") ?: return@composable
    35→            val url = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(entry.arguments?.getString("url") ?: "", "UTF-8")
    36→            WebViewScreen(
    37→                viewModel = viewModel,
    38→                smsId = smsId,
    39→                url = url,
    40→                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
    41→            )
    42→        }
    43→        composable(
    44→            "pdf/{pdfId}",
    45→            arguments = listOf(navArgument("pdfId") { type = NavType.LongType })
    46→        ) { entry ->
    47→            val pdfId = entry.arguments?.getLong("pdfId") ?: return@composable
    48→            PdfPreviewScreen(
    49→                viewModel = viewModel,
    50→                pdfId = pdfId,
    51→                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
    52→            )
    53→        }
    54→    }
    55→}
    56→

1→package com.court.assistant.data.db
     2→
     3→import androidx.room.*
     4→
     5→@Entity(
     6→    tableName = "pdf_documents",
     7→    foreignKeys = [ForeignKey(
     8→        entity = CourtSmsEntity::class,
     9→        parentColumns = ["id"],
    10→        childColumns = ["smsId"],
    11→        onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
    12→    )],
    13→    indices = [
    14→        Index(value = ["smsId"]),
    15→        Index(value = ["smsId", "fileMd5"], unique = true)
    16→    ]
    17→)
    18→data class PdfDocumentEntity(
    19→    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    20→    val smsId: Long,
    21→    val fileName: String,           // 原始文件名
    22→    val filePath: String,
    23→    val fileSize: Long,
    24→    val fileMd5: String,            // MD5哈希用于去重
    25→    val ocrTitle: String? = null,   // OCR提取的标题（首页前15个字）
    26→    val downloadedAt: Long,
    27→    val isSubpoena: Boolean = false,
    28→    val hearingInfo: String? = null,
    29→    val calendarEventId: Long? = null
    30→)
    31→

1→package com.court.assistant.ui.theme
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.material3.*
     4→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
     5→import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
     6→
     7→// 宋式美学配色 - 取自汝窑青瓷、水墨绢帛、茶烟素雅
     8→val Ivory = Color(0xFFF6F2EB)          // 绢帛底色
     9→val WarmWhite = Color(0xFFFAF8F4)      // 宣纸白
    10→val InkBlack = Color(0xFF1A1A1A)       // 浓墨
    11→val CharcoalGray = Color(0xFF3D3B38)   // 淡墨
    12→val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFF8B4C3B)    // 赭石（沉稳的宋式红褐）
    13→val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFBE8978)  // 浅赭
    14→val MistGray = Color(0xFFDDD8D0)       // 烟灰
    15→val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFEDE8DF)    // 素笺
    16→val JadeGreen = Color(0xFF6B8E6B)      // 青瓷绿
    17→val AmberGold = Color(0xFFB09563)      // 茶色金
    18→
    19→private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    20→    primary = CinnabarRed,
    21→    onPrimary = Color.White,
    22→    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.2f),
    23→    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    24→    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    25→    onSecondary = Color.White,
    26→    background = Ivory,
    27→    onBackground = InkBlack,
    28→    surface = WarmWhite,
    29→    onSurface = InkBlack,
    30→    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    31→    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    32→    outline = MistGray,
    33→    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    34→    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
    35→)
    36→
    37→@Composable
    38→fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    39→    MaterialTheme(
    40→        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
    41→        typography = CourtTypography,
    42→        content = content
    43→    )
    44→}
    45→

content.content:
1→package com.court.assistant.pdf
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.graphics.Bitmap
     5→import android.graphics.pdf.PdfRenderer
     6→import android.os.ParcelFileDescriptor
     7→import com.google.mlkit.vision.common.InputImage
     8→import com.google.mlkit.vision.text.TextRecognition
     9→import com.google.mlkit.vision.text.chinese.ChineseTextRecognizerOptions
    10→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    11→import kotlinx.coroutines.suspendCancellableCoroutine
    12→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    13→import java.io.File
    14→import java.util.*
    15→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
    16→
    17→data class SubpoenaInfo(
    18→    val caseNumber: String?,       // 案号
    19→    val courtName: String?,       // 法院简称
    20→    val hearingTime: Long?,       // 应到时间
    21→    val defendant: String?,        // 被传唤人
    22→    val handler: String?,         // 承办人
    23→    val location: String?,        // 应到处所
    24→    val phone: String?,           // 电话
    25→    val caseType: String?         // 案由
    26→)
    27→
    28→class PdfParser(private val context: Context) {
    29→
    30→    suspend fun parseSubpoena(filePath: String): SubpoenaInfo? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    31→        val text = extractText(filePath)
    32→        if (text.isNullOrBlank()) return@withContext null
    33→        parseSubpoenaText(text)
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    private suspend fun extractText(filePath: String): String? {
    37→        // 先尝试 iText 提取
    38→        val iTextResult = extractWithIText(filePath)
    39→        if (!iTextResult.isNullOrBlank() && iTextResult.any { it.code > 0x4E00 }) {
    40→            return iTextResult
    41→        }
    42→        // 回退到 OCR
    43→        return extractWithOcr(filePath)
    44→    }
    45→
    46→    private fun extractWithIText(filePath: String): String? {
    47→        return try {
    48→            val reader = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.PdfReader(filePath)
    49→            val doc = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.PdfDocument(reader)
    50→            val sb = StringBuilder()
    51→            for (i in 1..doc.numberOfPages) {
    52→                val text = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.canvas.parser.PdfTextExtractor.getTextFromPage(doc.getPage(i))
    53→                sb.appendLine(text)
    54→            }
    55→            doc.close()
    56→            sb.toString()
    57→        } catch (_: Exception) { null }
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    private suspend fun extractWithOcr(filePath: String): String? {
    61→        val file = File(filePath)
    62→        if (!file.exists()) return null
    63→        val fd = ParcelFileDescriptor.open(file, ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY)
    64→        val renderer = PdfRenderer(fd)
    65→        val sb = StringBuilder()
    66→        val recognizer = TextRecognition.getClient(ChineseTextRecognizerOptions.Builder().build())
    67→
    68→        for (i in 0 until renderer.pageCount) {
    69→            val page = renderer.openPage(i)
    70→            val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(page.width * 2, page.height * 2, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)
    71→            page.render(bitmap, null, null, PdfRenderer.Page.RENDER_MODE_FOR_DISPLAY)
    72→            page.close()
    73→
    74→            val text = suspendCancellableCoroutine<String?> { cont ->
    75→                val image = InputImage.fromBitmap(bitmap, 0)
    76→                recognizer.process(image)
    77→                    .addOnSuccessListener { result -> cont.resume(result.text) }
    78→                    .addOnFailureListener { cont.resume(null) }
    79→            }
    80→            if (text != null) sb.appendLine(text)
    81→            bitmap.recycle()
    82→        }
    83→        renderer.close()
    84→        fd.close()
    85→        return sb.toString().takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    86→    }
    87→
    88→    private fun parseSubpoenaText(text: String): SubpoenaInfo {
    89→        val caseNumber = Regex("[（(]\\d{4}[）)][^\\s，。]+号").find(text)?.value
    90→        val courtName = Regex("(.+?法院)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)
    91→
    92→        // 提取被传唤人（优先提取"被传唤人"或"被告"）
    93→        val defendant = try {
    94→            // 优先匹配"被传唤人"
    95→            Regex("被传唤人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
    96→                // 其次匹配"被告"
    97→                ?: Regex("被告[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
    98→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
    99→
   100→        // 提取承办人（法官/审判员）
   101→        val handler = try {
   102→            listOf(
   103→                Regex("承办人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   104→                Regex("审判[长员][：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   105→                Regex("法官[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)"),
   106→                Regex("经办人[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)")
   107→            ).firstNotNullOfOrNull { it.find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim() }
   108→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
   109→
   110→        // 提取联系电话（手机或固话）
   111→        val phonePattern = "([1][3-9]\\d{9}|0\\d{2,3}-?\\d{7,8})"
   112→        val phone = try {
   113→            listOf(
   114→                Regex("电话[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern"),
   115→                Regex("联系电话[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern"),
   116→                Regex("手机[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern"),
   117→                Regex("联系方式[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern"),
   118→                Regex("(?:tel|Tel|TEL)[：:]?\\s*$phonePattern")
   119→            ).firstNotNullOfOrNull { it.find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim() }
   120→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
   121→
   122→        val location = Regex("(?:应到处所|应到地点|地[点址])[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
   123→
   124→        var hearingTime: Long? = null
   125→        val timeMatch = Regex("(?:应到时间|开庭时间|定于)[：:]?\\s*(\\d{4})[年-](\\d{1,2})[月-](\\d{1,2})[日号]?[\\s]*(\\d{1,2})[时点:：](\\d{0,2})[分]?").find(text)
   126→        if (timeMatch != null) {
   127→            val hour = timeMatch.groupValues[4].toInt()
   128→            val minute = timeMatch.groupValues[5].takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.toInt() ?: 0
   129→            val cal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
   130→                clear()
   131→                set(timeMatch.groupValues[1].toInt(),
   132→                    timeMatch.groupValues[2].toInt() - 1,
   133→                    timeMatch.groupValues[3].toInt(),
   134→                    hour, minute, 0)
   135→            }
   136→            hearingTime = cal.timeInMillis
   137→        }
   138→
   139→        // 提取案由
   140→        val caseType = Regex("(?:案由|纠纷类型)[：:]?\\s*([^\\n，。]+)").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)?.trim()
   141→
   142→        return SubpoenaInfo(caseNumber, courtName, hearingTime, defendant, handler, location, phone, caseType)
   143→    }
   144→}
   145→

content.content:
1→package com.court.assistant.sms
     2→
     3→import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
     4→import java.util.*
     5→
     6→data class ParsedSms(
     7→    val caseNumber: String?,
     8→    val courtName: String?,
     9→    val hearingTime: Long?,
    10→    val partyNames: String?,
    11→    val webUrl: String?
    12→)
    13→
    14→class SmsParser {
    15→    // 案号: （2024）鲁1312民初1324号
    16→    private val caseNumberPattern = Regex("[（(]\\d{4}[）)][^\\s，。,\\.]+号")
    17→    // 法院名称: 【xxx法院】
    18→    private val courtPattern = Regex("【(.+?法院[）】]?)")
    19→    // 当事人: 】xxx你好 or 】xxx，你好
    20→    private val partyPattern = Regex("】(\\S+?)(?:你好|，你好|,你好)")
    21→    // URL
    22→    private val urlPattern = Regex("https?://[^\\s<>\"]+")
    23→    // 开庭时间 - 多种格式
    24→    private val datePatterns = listOf(
    25→        Regex("(\\d{4})年(\\d{1,2})月(\\d{1,2})日[\\s]*(\\d{1,2})[时点:：](\\d{0,2})[分]?"),
    26→        Regex("(\\d{4})-(\\d{1,2})-(\\d{1,2})[\\s]+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2})"),
    27→        Regex("(\\d{4})/(\\d{1,2})/(\\d{1,2})[\\s]+(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2})")
    28→    )
    29→
    30→    fun parse(body: String): ParsedSms {
    31→        val caseNumber = caseNumberPattern.find(body)?.value
    32→        val courtFull = courtPattern.find(body)?.groupValues?.getOrNull(1)
    33→        val courtName = courtFull?.let { simplifyCourtName(it) }
    34→        val partyNames = partyPattern.find(body)?.groupValues?.getOrNull(1)
    35→        val webUrl = urlPattern.find(body)?.value
    36→        val hearingTime = parseHearingTime(body)
    37→
    38→        return ParsedSms(
    39→            caseNumber = caseNumber,
    40→            courtName = courtName,
    41→            hearingTime = hearingTime,
    42→            partyNames = partyNames,
    43→            webUrl = webUrl
    44→        )
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    private fun simplifyCourtName(name: String): String {
    48→        // 去掉省市前缀，保留区+法院
    49→        // "临沂市河东区人民法院" -> "河东区法院"
    50→        val cleaned = name.replace("】", "").replace("【", "")
    51→        val match = Regex("(\\S+?[区县市旗])人民法院").find(cleaned)
    52→        if (match != null) {
    53→            val district = match.groupValues[1]
    54→            // 取最后一个行政区划
    55→            val parts = Regex("[省市州盟]").split(district)
    56→            return "${parts.last()}法院"
    57→        }
    58→        return cleaned.replace("人民", "")
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    private fun parseHearingTime(text: String): Long? {
    62→        for (pattern in datePatterns) {
    63→            val match = pattern.find(text) ?: continue
    64→            try {
    65→                val year = match.groupValues[1].toInt()
    66→                val month = match.groupValues[2].toInt()
    67→                val day = match.groupValues[3].toInt()
    68→                val hour = match.groupValues[4].toInt()
    69→                val minute = match.groupValues.getOrNull(5)?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.toInt() ?: 0
    70→                val cal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
    71→                    clear()
    72→                    set(year, month - 1, day, hour, minute, 0)
    73→                }
    74→                return cal.timeInMillis
    75→            } catch (_: Exception) { continue }
    76→        }
    77→        return null
    78→    }
    79→}
    80→

content.content:
1→package com.court.assistant.calendar
     2→
     3→import android.content.ContentUris
     4→import android.content.ContentValues
     5→import android.content.Context
     6→import android.provider.CalendarContract
     7→import java.util.*
     8→
     9→class CalendarSync(private val context: Context) {
    10→
    11→    fun syncHearing(
    12→        caseNumber: String,
    13→        courtName: String?,
    14→        hearingTime: Long,
    15→        defendant: String?,        // 被传唤人
    16→        handler: String?,          // 承办人
    17→        location: String?,         // 应到处所
    18→        phone: String?,            // 电话
    19→        caseType: String? = null,  // 案由
    20→        partyNames: String? = null,
    21→        description: String? = null
    22→    ): Long? {
    23→        val calendarId = getOrCreateCalendarId() ?: return null
    24→        val timeFormat = java.text.SimpleDateFormat("MM/dd HH:mm", java.util.Locale.CHINA).apply {
    25→            timeZone = java.util.TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")
    26→        }
    27→        val title = buildString {
    28→            append(timeFormat.format(java.util.Date(hearingTime)))
    29→            if (location != null) append(" $location")
    30→            if (defendant != null) append(" $defendant")
    31→            if (phone != null) append(" $phone")
    32→            if (caseType != null) append(" $caseType")
    33→            append(" $caseNumber")
    34→        }
    35→
    36→        // 去重：案号+时间+当事人
    37→        if (eventExists(caseNumber, hearingTime, defendant)) return null
    38→        val desc = buildString {
    39→            val timeFormat = java.text.SimpleDateFormat("yyyy年MM月dd日 HH:mm", java.util.Locale.CHINA).apply {
    40→                timeZone = java.util.TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")
    41→            }
    42→            append("⏰ ${timeFormat.format(java.util.Date(hearingTime))}")
    43→            if (location != null) append("\n📍 $location")
    44→            append("\n\n案号: $caseNumber")
    45→            if (courtName != null) append("\n法院: $courtName")
    46→            if (defendant != null) append("\n被传唤人: $defendant")
    47→            if (handler != null) append("\n承办人: $handler")
    48→            if (phone != null) append("\n电话: $phone")
    49→            if (partyNames != null) append("\n当事人: $partyNames")
    50→            if (description != null) append("\n$description")
    51→        }
    52→
    53→        // 全天事件：取开庭日期在UTC时区的0点
    54→        val shanghaiCal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
    55→            timeInMillis = hearingTime
    56→        }
    57→        val utcCal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("UTC")).apply {
    58→            clear()
    59→            set(shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.YEAR), shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.MONTH), shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH), 0, 0, 0)
    60→        }
    61→        val dayStart = utcCal.timeInMillis
    62→        utcCal.add(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH, 1)
    63→        val dayEnd = utcCal.timeInMillis
    64→
    65→        val values = ContentValues().apply {
    66→            put(CalendarContract.Events.CALENDAR_ID, calendarId)
    67→            put(CalendarContract.Events.TITLE, title)
    68→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DESCRIPTION, desc)
    69→            put(CalendarContract.Events.ALL_DAY, 1)
    70→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART, dayStart)
    71→            put(CalendarContract.Events.DTEND, dayEnd)
    72→            put(CalendarContract.Events.EVENT_TIMEZONE, "UTC")
    73→            put(CalendarContract.Events.HAS_ALARM, 1)
    74→        }
    75→
    76→        val uri = context.contentResolver.insert(CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, values)
    77→        val eventId = uri?.let { ContentUris.parseId(it) }
    78→
    79→        // 添加提醒：提前1天和1小时
    80→        if (eventId != null) {
    81→            addReminder(eventId, 24 * 60) // 1天
    82→            addReminder(eventId, 60)       // 1小时
    83→        }
    84→        return eventId
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    private fun eventExists(caseNumber: String, hearingTime: Long, defendant: String?): Boolean {
    88→        val shanghaiCal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
    89→            timeInMillis = hearingTime
    90→        }
    91→        val utcCal = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("UTC")).apply {
    92→            clear()
    93→            set(shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.YEAR), shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.MONTH), shanghaiCal.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH), 0, 0, 0)
    94→        }
    95→        val dayStart = utcCal.timeInMillis
    96→        val projection = arrayOf(CalendarContract.Events._ID)
    97→        val selection: String
    98→        val args: Array<String>
    99→        if (defendant != null) {
   100→            selection = "${CalendarContract.Events.TITLE} LIKE ? AND ${CalendarContract.Events.TITLE} LIKE ? AND ${CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART} = ?"
   101→            args = arrayOf("%$caseNumber%", "%$defendant%", dayStart.toString())
   102→        } else {
   103→            selection = "${CalendarContract.Events.TITLE} LIKE ? AND ${CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART} = ?"
   104→            args = arrayOf("%$caseNumber%", dayStart.toString())
   105→        }
   106→        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(
   107→            CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, projection, selection, args, null
   108→        )
   109→        return cursor?.use { it.count > 0 } ?: false
   110→    }
   111→
   112→    private fun getOrCreateCalendarId(): Long? {
   113→        // 先查找已有日历
   114→        val projection = arrayOf(CalendarContract.Calendars._ID)
   115→        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(
   116→            CalendarContract.Calendars.CONTENT_URI, projection, null, null, null
   117→        )
   118→        cursor?.use {
   119→            if (it.moveToFirst()) return it.getLong(0)
   120→        }
   121→        return null // 使用系统默认日历
   122→    }
   123→
   124→    private fun addReminder(eventId: Long, minutes: Int) {
   125→        val values = ContentValues().apply {
   126→            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.EVENT_ID, eventId)
   127→            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.MINUTES, minutes)
   128→            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD, CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD_ALERT)
   129→        }
   130→        context.contentResolver.insert(CalendarContract.Reminders.CONTENT_URI, values)
   131→    }
   132→}
   133→

     5→
     6→class CourtRepository(private val dao: CourtDao) {
     7→    fun getAllSms(): Flow<List<CourtSmsEntity>> = dao.getAllSms()
     8→    suspend fun getAllSmsList(): List<CourtSmsEntity> = dao.getAllSmsList()
     9→    suspend fun getSmsById(id: Long) = dao.getSmsById(id)
    10→    suspend fun insertSms(sms: CourtSmsEntity) = dao.insertSms(sms)
    11→    suspend fun updateSms(sms: CourtSmsEntity) = dao.updateSms(sms)

    13→    fun getAllPdfs() = dao.getAllPdfs()
    14→    suspend fun insertPdf(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity) = dao.insertPdf(pdf)
    15→    suspend fun updatePdf(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity) = dao.updatePdf(pdf)
    16→    suspend fun getPdfById(id: Long) = dao.getPdfById(id)
    17→    suspend fun smsExists(hash: Int, sender: String) = dao.smsExists(hash, sender)
    18→    suspend fun pdfExists(filePath: String) = dao.pdfExists(filePath)
    19→    suspend fun pdfExistsByMd5(md5: String) = dao.pdfExistsByMd5(md5)
    20→    suspend fun getPdfByMd5(md5: String) = dao.getPdfByMd5(md5)
    21→    suspend fun deletePdf(id: Long) = dao.deletePdf(id)
    22→    suspend fun clearAllSms() = dao.clearAllSms()
    23→    suspend fun clearAllPdfs() = dao.clearAllPdfs()
    24→    suspend fun clearAllData() {
    25→        clearAllPdfs()
    26→        clearAllSms()
    27→    }

1→package com.court.assistant.data.db
     2→
     3→import androidx.room.*
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
     5→
     6→@Dao
     7→interface CourtDao {
     8→    @Query("SELECT * FROM court_sms ORDER BY receivedAt DESC")
     9→    fun getAllSms(): Flow<List<CourtSmsEntity>>
    10→
    11→    @Query("SELECT * FROM court_sms ORDER BY receivedAt DESC")
    12→    suspend fun getAllSmsList(): List<CourtSmsEntity>
    13→
    14→    @Query("SELECT * FROM court_sms WHERE id = :id")
    15→    suspend fun getSmsById(id: Long): CourtSmsEntity?
    16→
    17→    @Insert(onConflict = OnConflictStrategy.IGNORE)
    18→    suspend fun insertSms(sms: CourtSmsEntity): Long
    19→
    20→    @Update
    21→    suspend fun updateSms(sms: CourtSmsEntity)
    22→
    23→    @Query("SELECT * FROM pdf_documents WHERE smsId = :smsId ORDER BY downloadedAt")
    24→    fun getPdfsBySmsId(smsId: Long): Flow<List<PdfDocumentEntity>>
    25→
    26→    @Query("SELECT * FROM pdf_documents ORDER BY downloadedAt DESC")
    27→    fun getAllPdfs(): Flow<List<PdfDocumentEntity>>
    28→
    29→    @Insert(onConflict = OnConflictStrategy.IGNORE)
    30→    suspend fun insertPdf(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity): Long
    31→
    32→    @Update
    33→    suspend fun updatePdf(pdf: PdfDocumentEntity)
    34→
    35→    @Query("SELECT * FROM pdf_documents WHERE id = :id")
    36→    suspend fun getPdfById(id: Long): PdfDocumentEntity?
    37→
    38→    @Query("SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM court_sms WHERE bodyHash = :hash AND sender = :sender)")
    39→    suspend fun smsExists(hash: Int, sender: String): Boolean
    40→
    41→    @Query("SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pdf_documents WHERE filePath = :filePath)")
    42→    suspend fun pdfExists(filePath: String): Boolean
    43→
    44→    @Query("SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pdf_documents WHERE fileMd5 = :md5)")
    45→    suspend fun pdfExistsByMd5(md5: String): Boolean
    46→
    47→    @Query("SELECT * FROM pdf_documents WHERE fileMd5 = :md5 LIMIT 1")
    48→    suspend fun getPdfByMd5(md5: String): PdfDocumentEntity?
    49→
    50→    @Query("SELECT id FROM pdf_documents WHERE filePath = :filePath LIMIT 1")
    51→    suspend fun getPdfIdByPath(filePath: String): Long?
    52→
    53→    @Query("DELETE FROM pdf_documents WHERE id = :id")
    54→    suspend fun deletePdf(id: Long)
    55→
    56→    @Query("DELETE FROM court_sms")
    57→    suspend fun clearAllSms()
    58→
    59→    @Query("DELETE FROM pdf_documents")
    60→    suspend fun clearAllPdfs()
    61→}
    62→

1→package com.court.assistant.data.db
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import androidx.room.migration.Migration
     5→import androidx.sqlite.db.SupportSQLiteDatabase
     6→import androidx.room.*
     7→
     8→val MIGRATION_1_2 = object : Migration(1, 2) {
     9→    override fun migrate(database: SupportSQLiteDatabase) {
    10→        // 删除旧表并重建，添加 fileMd5 和 ocrTitle 列
    11→        database.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS pdf_documents")
    12→        database.execSQL("""
    13→            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pdf_documents (
    14→                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    15→                smsId INTEGER NOT NULL,
    16→                fileName TEXT NOT NULL,
    17→                filePath TEXT NOT NULL,
    18→                fileSize INTEGER NOT NULL,
    19→                fileMd5 TEXT NOT NULL,
    20→                ocrTitle TEXT,
    21→                downloadedAt INTEGER NOT NULL,
    22→                isSubpoena INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    23→                hearingInfo TEXT,
    24→                calendarEventId INTEGER,
    25→                FOREIGN KEY(smsId) REFERENCES court_sms(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    26→            )
    27→        """)
    28→        database.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_pdf_documents_smsId ON pdf_documents(smsId)")
    29→        database.execSQL("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_pdf_documents_fileMd5 ON pdf_documents(fileMd5)")
    30→    }
    31→}
    32→
    33→val MIGRATION_2_3 = object : Migration(2, 3) {
    34→    override fun migrate(database: SupportSQLiteDatabase) {
    35→        // 重建pdf_documents表，改为 smsId+fileMd5 联合唯一索引
    36→        database.execSQL("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS pdf_documents")
    37→        database.execSQL("""
    38→            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pdf_documents (
    39→                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    40→                smsId INTEGER NOT NULL,
    41→                fileName TEXT NOT NULL,
    42→                filePath TEXT NOT NULL,
    43→                fileSize INTEGER NOT NULL,
    44→                fileMd5 TEXT NOT NULL,
    45→                ocrTitle TEXT,
    46→                downloadedAt INTEGER NOT NULL,
    47→                isSubpoena INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    48→                hearingInfo TEXT,
    49→                calendarEventId INTEGER,
    50→                FOREIGN KEY(smsId) REFERENCES court_sms(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    51→            )
    52→        """)
    53→        database.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_pdf_documents_smsId ON pdf_documents(smsId)")
    54→        database.execSQL("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_pdf_documents_smsId_fileMd5 ON pdf_documents(smsId, fileMd5)")
    55→    }
    56→}
    57→
    58→val MIGRATION_3_4 = object : Migration(3, 4) {
    59→    override fun migrate(database: SupportSQLiteDatabase) {
    60→        // court_sms唯一索引从bodyHash改为bodyHash+sender，允许不同发送者的相同内容短信共存
    61→        database.execSQL("DROP INDEX IF EXISTS index_court_sms_bodyHash")
    62→        database.execSQL("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS index_court_sms_bodyHash_sender ON court_sms(bodyHash, sender)")
    63→    }
    64→}
    65→
    66→@Database(
    67→    entities = [CourtSmsEntity::class, PdfDocumentEntity::class],
    68→    version = 4,
    69→    exportSchema = false
    70→)
    71→abstract class CourtDatabase : RoomDatabase() {
    72→    abstract fun courtDao(): CourtDao
    73→
    74→    companion object {
    75→        @Volatile
    76→        private var INSTANCE: CourtDatabase? = null
    77→
    78→        fun getInstance(context: Context): CourtDatabase {
    79→            return INSTANCE ?: synchronized(this) {
    80→                Room.databaseBuilder(
    81→                    context.applicationContext,
    82→                    CourtDatabase::class.java,
    83→                    "court_assistant.db"
    84→                )
    85→                .addMigrations(MIGRATION_1_2, MIGRATION_2_3, MIGRATION_3_4)
    86→                .build().also { INSTANCE = it }
    87→            }
    88→        }
    89→    }
    90→}
    91→

1→package com.court.assistant.ui
     2→
     3→import android.graphics.Bitmap
     4→import android.graphics.pdf.PdfRenderer
     5→import android.os.ParcelFileDescriptor
     6→import androidx.compose.foundation.*
     7→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
     8→import androidx.compose.foundation.shape.RoundedCornerShape
     9→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
    10→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.ArrowBack
    11→import androidx.compose.material3.*
    12→import androidx.compose.runtime.*
    13→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    15→import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.asImageBitmap
    16→import androidx.compose.ui.layout.ContentScale
    17→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    18→import com.court.assistant.data.db.PdfDocumentEntity
    19→import com.court.assistant.ui.theme.*
    20→import com.court.assistant.viewmodel.MainViewModel
    21→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    22→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    23→import java.io.File
    24→
    25→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    26→@Composable
    27→fun PdfPreviewScreen(
    28→    viewModel: MainViewModel,
    29→    pdfId: Long,
    30→    onBack: () -> Unit
    31→) {
    32→    var pdf by remember { mutableStateOf<PdfDocumentEntity?>(null) }
    33→    var pages by remember { mutableStateOf<List<Bitmap>>(emptyList()) }
    34→    var error by remember { mutableStateOf<String?>(null) }
    35→
    36→    LaunchedEffect(pdfId) {
    37→        val doc = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    38→            val app = viewModel.getApplication<com.court.assistant.CourtApp>()
    39→            app.repository.getPdfById(pdfId)
    40→        }
    41→        pdf = doc
    42→        if (doc != null) {
    43→            try {
    44→                pages = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) { renderPdfPages(doc.filePath) }
    45→            } catch (e: Exception) {
    46→                error = "无法预览: ${e.message}"
    47→            }
    48→        }
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    Scaffold(
    52→        topBar = {
    53→            TopAppBar(
    54→                title = {
    55→                    Text(
    56→                        pdf?.fileName ?: "文书预览",
    57→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
    58→                        maxLines = 1
    59→                    )
    60→                },
    61→                navigationIcon = {
    62→                    IconButton(onClick = onBack) {
    63→                        Icon(Icons.Default.ArrowBack, contentDescription = "返回")
    64→                    }
    65→                },
    66→                colors = TopAppBarDefaults.topAppBarColors(
    67→                    containerColor = Ivory,
    68→                    titleContentColor = InkBlack
    69→                )
    70→            )
    71→        }
    72→    ) { padding ->
    73→        Column(
    74→            modifier = Modifier
    75→                .fillMaxSize()
    76→                .padding(padding)
    77→                .verticalScroll(rememberScrollState())
    78→        ) {
    79→            // 开庭信息卡片（如果是传票）
    80→            pdf?.hearingInfo?.let { info ->
    81→                Card(
    82→                    modifier = Modifier
    83→                        .fillMaxWidth()
    84→                        .padding(12.dp),
    85→                    colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = CinnabarRed.copy(alpha = 0.08f)),
    86→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(8.dp)
    87→                ) {
    88→                    Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)) {
    89→                        Text(
    90→                            "📋 开庭信息",
    91→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    92→                            color = CinnabarRed
    93→                        )
    94→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
    95→                        Text(
    96→                            info,
    97→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
    98→                            color = InkBlack
    99→                        )
   100→                        if (pdf?.calendarEventId != null) {
   101→                            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   102→                            Text(
   103→                                "✅ 已同步到系统日历",
   104→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   105→                                color = JadeGreen
   106→                            )
   107→                        }
   108→                    }
   109→                }
   110→            }
   111→
   112→            if (error != null) {
   113→                Text(
   114→                    error!!,
   115→                    color = CinnabarRed,
   116→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp)
   117→                )
   118→            }
   119→
   120→            // PDF 页面渲染
   121→            pages.forEachIndexed { index, bitmap ->
   122→                Image(
   123→                    bitmap = bitmap.asImageBitmap(),
   124→                    contentDescription = "第 ${index + 1} 页",
   125→                    modifier = Modifier
   126→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   127→                        .padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp),
   128→                    contentScale = ContentScale.FillWidth
   129→                )
   130→            }
   131→
   132→            if (pages.isEmpty() && error == null) {
   133→                CircularProgressIndicator(
   134→                    modifier = Modifier
   135→                        .align(Alignment.CenterHorizontally)
   136→                        .padding(32.dp),
   137→                    color = CinnabarRed
   138→                )
   139→            }
   140→        }
   141→    }
   142→}
   143→
   144→private fun renderPdfPages(filePath: String): List<Bitmap> {
   145→    val file = File(filePath)
   146→    if (!file.exists()) return emptyList()
   147→    val fd = ParcelFileDescriptor.open(file, ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY)
   148→    val renderer = PdfRenderer(fd)
   149→    val bitmaps = mutableListOf<Bitmap>()
   150→    for (i in 0 until renderer.pageCount) {
   151→        val page = renderer.openPage(i)
   152→        val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(page.width * 2, page.height * 2, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)
   153→        page.render(bitmap, null, null, PdfRenderer.Page.RENDER_MODE_FOR_DISPLAY)
   154→        page.close()
   155→        bitmaps.add(bitmap)
   156→    }
   157→    renderer.close()
   158→    fd.close()
   159→    return bitmaps
   160→}
   161→

content.text:
I'll now provide a comprehensive analysis of the CourtAssistant project architecture based on my exploration.

## CourtAssistant Architecture Analysis

### 1. **hearingTime Data Flow**

**Source → Storage → UI Display:**

- **SMS Parser** (`SmsParser.kt`): Extracts `hearingTime` as `Long` (milliseconds) from SMS text using regex patterns for dates like "2024年12月15日 14:30"
- **Database Storage** (`CourtSmsEntity`): Stores `hearingTime: Long?` in `court_sms` table
- **PDF Parser** (`PdfParser.kt`): Also extracts `hearingTime` from PDF content
- **PDF Entity** (`PdfDocumentEntity`): Stores `hearingInfo: String?` (formatted text) and implicitly uses `hearingTime` via `calendarEventId`
- **ViewModel** (`MainViewModel.kt`): 
  - Line 83: `hearingTime = parsed.hearingTime` - flows from SMS to entity
  - Line 196: `hearingTime = info.hearingTime` - flows from PDF parser to calendar sync
  - `SmsWithPdfs` data class (line 25-28) exposes SMS with PDFs to UI
- **UI Display** (`MainScreen.kt`):
  - `PdfCard` (line 336): Shows `isSubpoena` flag and `calendarEventId` status
  - `PdfPreviewScreen.kt` (line 80-109): Displays `hearingInfo` text in a card

### 2. **Navigation Structure**

**Current Routes** (`Navigation.kt`):
- `"main"` → `MainScreen` (entry point)
- `"webview/{smsId}/{url}"` → `WebViewScreen` (PDF download)
- `"pdf/{pdfId}"` → `PdfPreviewScreen` (PDF preview)

**To add Settings page:**
```kotlin
composable("settings") {
    SettingsScreen(onBack = { navController.popBackStack() })
}
```

Then call from MainScreen:
```kotlin
onOpenSettings = { navController.navigate("settings") }
```

### 3. **Typography & Theme Setup**

**Type.kt**: Uses `FontFamily.Serif` with custom sizes:
- `headlineMedium`: 26sp (for titles)
- `bodyMedium`: 16sp (for content)
- `labelSmall`: 14sp (for metadata)

**Theme.kt**: Song Dynasty aesthetic with colors:
- `CinnabarRed` (0xFF8B4C3B) - primary
- `Ivory` (0xFFF6F2EB) - backgrounds
- `JadeGreen` (0xFF6B8E6B) - accents

### 4. **Countdown Calculation ("周二-3日后14:30" format)**

The format requires:
- Day of week (周一-周日)
- Days until hearing (X日后 or 今天/明天)
- Time (HH:mm)

**Implementation approach:**
```kotlin
fun formatHearingCountdown(hearingTimeMs: Long): String {
    val now = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai"))
    val hearing = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
        timeInMillis = hearingTimeMs
    }
    
    val dayDiff = hearing.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR) - now.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR)
    val dayName = arrayOf("周日", "周一", "周二", "周三", "周四", "周五", "周六")[hearing.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_WEEK) - 1]
    val daysText = when {
        dayDiff == 0 -> "今天"
        dayDiff == 1 -> "明天"
        dayDiff > 0 -> "${dayDiff}日后"
        else -> "已过期"
    }
    val time = SimpleDateFormat("HH:mm", Locale.CHINA).format(Date(hearingTimeMs))
    return "$dayName-$daysText$time"
}
```

### 5. **Preferences/DataStore Usage**

**Current Status**: No SharedPreferences or DataStore found in the project.

**For Settings persistence**, recommend:
- Use `androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences` (modern approach)
- Store user preferences like notification settings, default calendar, etc.

### 6. **Key Data Structures**

**PdfDocumentEntity** (line 18-30):
```kotlin
data class PdfDocumentEntity(
    val id: Long = 0,
    val smsId: Long,
    val fileName: String,
    val filePath: String,
    val fileSize: Long,
    val fileMd5: String,
    val ocrTitle: String? = null,
    val downloadedAt: Long,
    val isSubpoena: Boolean = false,      // Indicates if it's a subpoena
    val hearingInfo: String? = null,      // Formatted hearing details
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null     // Synced to calendar
)
```

**CourtSmsEntity** (line 9-21):
```kotlin
data class CourtSmsEntity(
    val id: Long = 0,
    val sender: String,
    val bodyHash: Int,
    val receivedAt: Long,
    val caseNumber: String?,
    val courtName: String?,
    val hearingTime: Long?,              // Raw milliseconds timestamp
    val partyNames: String?,
    val webUrl: String?,
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null
)
```

### 7. **Calendar Sync Integration**

**CalendarSync.kt** (line 11-85):
- Takes `hearingTime: Long` and creates all-day calendar events
- Converts Shanghai timezone to UTC for calendar storage
- Adds 2 reminders: 1 day before + 1 hour before
- Deduplicates by case number + hearing time + defendant

### 8. **Database Architecture**

- **Room Database** with 2 entities: `CourtSmsEntity`, `PdfDocumentEntity`
- **Foreign key**: PDF → SMS (cascade delete)
- **Unique indices**: 
  - SMS: `(bodyHash, sender)`
  - PDF: `(smsId, fileMd5)`
- **4 migrations** for schema evolution

### Summary for Implementation

To add a settings page with countdown display:

1. **Add route** in `Navigation.kt`
2. **Create SettingsScreen.kt** composable
3. **Add countdown formatter** utility function
4. **Display hearingTime** from `SmsWithPdfs.sms.hearingTime` or `PdfDocumentEntity.hearingInfo`
5. **Use existing colors/typography** from `Theme.kt` and `Type.kt`
6. **No preferences layer needed yet** - can add DataStore later if required

The `hearingTime` is already available throughout the UI state chain via `MainViewModel.uiState` → `SmsWithPdfs` → individual SMS/PDF entities.

```kotlin
fun formatHearingCountdown(hearingTimeMs: Long): String {
    val now = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai"))
    val hearing = Calendar.getInstance(TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")).apply {
        timeInMillis = hearingTimeMs
    }
    
    val dayDiff = hearing.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR) - now.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR)
    val dayName = arrayOf("周日", "周一", "周二", "周三", "周四", "周五", "周六")[hearing.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_WEEK) - 1]
    val daysText = when {
        dayDiff == 0 -> "今天"
        dayDiff == 1 -> "明天"
        dayDiff > 0 -> "${dayDiff}日后"
        else -> "已过期"
    }
    val time = SimpleDateFormat("HH:mm", Locale.CHINA).format(Date(hearingTimeMs))
    return "$dayName-$daysText$time"
}
```

### 5. **Preferences/DataStore Usage**

**Current Status**: No SharedPreferences or DataStore found in the project.

**For Settings persistence**, recommend:
- Use `androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences` (modern approach)
- Store user preferences like notification settings, default calendar, etc.

### 6. **Key Data Structures**

**PdfDocumentEntity** (line 18-30):
```kotlin
data class PdfDocumentEntity(
    val id: Long = 0,
    val smsId: Long,
    val fileName: String,
    val filePath: String,
    val fileSize: Long,
    val fileMd5: String,
    val ocrTitle: String? = null,
    val downloadedAt: Long,
    val isSubpoena: Boolean = false,      // Indicates if it's a subpoena
    val hearingInfo: String? = null,      // Formatted hearing details
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null     // Synced to calendar
)
```

**CourtSmsEntity** (line 9-21):
```kotlin
data class CourtSmsEntity(
    val id: Long = 0,
    val sender: String,
    val bodyHash: Int,
    val receivedAt: Long,
    val caseNumber: String?,
    val courtName: String?,
    val hearingTime: Long?,              // Raw milliseconds timestamp
    val partyNames: String?,
    val webUrl: String?,
    val calendarEventId: Long? = null
)
```

### 7. **Calendar Sync Integration**

**CalendarSync.kt** (line 11-85):
- Takes `hearingTime: Long` and creates all-day calendar events
- Converts Shanghai timezone to UTC for calendar storage
- Adds 2 reminders: 1 day before + 1 hour before
- Deduplicates by case number + hearing time + defendant

### 8. **Database Architecture**

- **Room Database** with 2 entities: `CourtSmsEntity`, `PdfDocumentEntity`
- **Foreign key**: PDF → SMS (cascade delete)
- **Unique indices**: 
  - SMS: `(bodyHash, sender)`
  - PDF: `(smsId, fileMd5)`
- **4 migrations** for schema evolution

### Summary for Implementation

To add a settings page with countdown display:

1. **Add route** in `Navigation.kt`
2. **Create SettingsScreen.kt** composable
3. **Add countdown formatter** utility function
4. **Display hearingTime** from `SmsWithPdfs.sms.hearingTime` or `PdfDocumentEntity.hearingInfo`
5. **Use existing colors/typography** from `Theme.kt` and `Type.kt`
6. **No preferences layer needed yet** - can add DataStore later if required

The `hearingTime` is already available throughout the UI state chain via `MainViewModel.uiState` → `SmsWithPdfs` → individual SMS/PDF entities.

# 计划：添加设置页字号选择 + 传票开庭倒计时红字提示

## 背景
用户需要两个功能：
1. 设置页面让用户自选字号大小（小/中/大）
2. 有传票PDF的短信卡片上，显示红字倒计时提示，格式如"周二-3日后14:30"

## 修改文件清单

### 1. 新建 `SettingsScreen.kt` — 设置页面
- 路径：`app/src/main/java/com/court/assistant/ui/SettingsScreen.kt`
- 提供字号选择：小/中/大 三档
- 使用 SharedPreferences 持久化（项目无 DataStore 依赖，不额外引入）

### 2. 修改 `Type.kt` — 动态字号
- 将 `CourtTypography` 改为函数 `CourtTypography(scale: Float)`，根据用户选择的缩放比例生成 Typography
- 小=0.85f，中=1.0f（默认），大=1.15f

### 3. 修改 `Theme.kt` — 读取用户字号偏好
- `CourtAssistantTheme` 中读取 SharedPreferences 获取字号缩放，传给 Typography

### 4. 修改 `MainScreen.kt` — 开庭倒计时红字
- 在 `SmsMenuCard` 头部，当 `sms.hearingTime != null` 时，显示红字倒计时
- 格式："周二-3日后14:30"
- 添加设置按钮入口（TopAppBar actions 中加齿轮图标）

### 5. 修改 `Navigation.kt` — 添加设置路由
- 添加 `"settings"` 路由指向 `SettingsScreen`

## 倒计时格式逻辑
```
hearingTime → Calendar:
- 星期几 → 周一~周日
- 距今天数 → 今天/明天/X日后/已过期
- 时间 → HH:mm
- 组合："周二-3日后14:30"
```

## 验证
- 打包安装到真机
- 测试设置页切换字号，返回主页字号变化
- 确认有传票的卡片显示红字倒计时

package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.Typography
import androidx.compose.ui.text.TextStyle
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontFamily
import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

fun courtTypography(scale: Float = 1f) = Typography(
    headlineLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = (32 * scale).sp,
        letterSpacing = 2.sp
    ),
    headlineMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
        fontSize = (26 * scale).sp,
        letterSpacing = 1.sp
    ),
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
        fontSize = (22 * scale).sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    titleMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
        fontSize = (18 * scale).sp
    ),
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = (18 * scale).sp,
        lineHeight = (28 * scale).sp
    ),
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = (16 * scale).sp,
        lineHeight = (24 * scale).sp
    ),
    labelLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = (16 * scale).sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Serif,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = (14 * scale).sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
)

// 默认值供向后兼容
val CourtTypography = courtTypography()

package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

// 宋式美学配色 - 取自汝窑青瓷、水墨绢帛、茶烟素雅
val Ivory = Color(0xFFF6F2EB)          // 绢帛底色
val WarmWhite = Color(0xFFFAF8F4)      // 宣纸白
val InkBlack = Color(0xFF1A1A1A)       // 浓墨
val CharcoalGray = Color(0xFF3D3B38)   // 淡墨
val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFF8B4C3B)    // 赭石（沉稳的宋式红褐）
val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFBE8978)  // 浅赭
val MistGray = Color(0xFFDDD8D0)       // 烟灰
val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFEDE8DF)    // 素笺
val JadeGreen = Color(0xFF6B8E6B)      // 青瓷绿
val AmberGold = Color(0xFFB09563)      // 茶色金

private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = CinnabarRed,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.2f),
    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    background = Ivory,
    onBackground = InkBlack,
    surface = WarmWhite,
    onSurface = InkBlack,
    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    outline = MistGray,
    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
)

@Composable
fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
        typography = CourtTypography,
        content = content
    )
}

package com.court.assistant.ui.theme

import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

// 宋式美学配色 - 取自汝窑青瓷、水墨绢帛、茶烟素雅
val Ivory = Color(0xFFF6F2EB)          // 绢帛底色
val WarmWhite = Color(0xFFFAF8F4)      // 宣纸白
val InkBlack = Color(0xFF1A1A1A)       // 浓墨
val CharcoalGray = Color(0xFF3D3B38)   // 淡墨
val CinnabarRed = Color(0xFF8B4C3B)    // 赭石（沉稳的宋式红褐）
val LightCinnabar = Color(0xFFBE8978)  // 浅赭
val MistGray = Color(0xFFDDD8D0)       // 烟灰
val ParchmentBg = Color(0xFFEDE8DF)    // 素笺
val JadeGreen = Color(0xFF6B8E6B)      // 青瓷绿
val AmberGold = Color(0xFFB09563)      // 茶色金

private val CourtColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = CinnabarRed,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = LightCinnabar.copy(alpha = 0.2f),
    onPrimaryContainer = CinnabarRed,
    secondary = CharcoalGray,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    background = Ivory,
    onBackground = InkBlack,
    surface = WarmWhite,
    onSurface = InkBlack,
    surfaceVariant = ParchmentBg,
    onSurfaceVariant = CharcoalGray,
    outline = MistGray,
    tertiary = JadeGreen,
    tertiaryContainer = AmberGold
)

@Composable
fun CourtAssistantTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit) {
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = CourtColorScheme,
        typography = CourtTypography,
        content = content
    )
}

1→package com.court.assistant.ui
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
     4→import androidx.navigation.NavType
     5→import androidx.navigation.compose.NavHost
     6→import androidx.navigation.compose.composable
     7→import androidx.navigation.compose.rememberNavController
     8→import androidx.navigation.navArgument
     9→import com.court.assistant.viewmodel.MainViewModel
    10→
    11→@Composable
    12→fun Navigation(viewModel: MainViewModel) {
    13→    val navController = rememberNavController()
    14→
    15→    NavHost(navController = navController, startDestination = "main") {
    16→        composable("main") {
    17→            MainScreen(
    18→                viewModel = viewModel,
    19→                onOpenWebView = { smsId, url ->
    20→                    navController.navigate("webview/$smsId/${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(url, "UTF-8")}")
    21→                },
    22→                onOpenPdf = { pdfId ->
    23→                    navController.navigate("pdf/$pdfId")
    24→                }
    25→            )
    26→        }
    27→        composable(
    28→            "webview/{smsId}/{url}",
    29→            arguments = listOf(
    30→                navArgument("smsId") { type = NavType.LongType },
    31→                navArgument("url") { type = NavType.StringType }
    32→            )
    33→        ) { entry ->
    34→            val smsId = entry.arguments?.getLong("smsId") ?: return@composable
    35→            val url = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(entry.arguments?.getString("url") ?: "", "UTF-8")
    36→            WebViewScreen(
    37→                viewModel = viewModel,
    38→                smsId = smsId,
    39→                url = url,
    40→                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
    41→            )
    42→        }
    43→        composable(
    44→            "pdf/{pdfId}",
    45→            arguments = listOf(navArgument("pdfId") { type = NavType.LongType })
    46→        ) { entry ->
    47→            val pdfId = entry.arguments?.getLong("pdfId") ?: return@composable
    48→            PdfPreviewScreen(
    49→                viewModel = viewModel,
    50→                pdfId = pdfId,
    51→                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
    52→            )
    53→        }
    54→    }
    55→}

content.text: APK 已经安装成功了。手机上可以直接测试新功能——设置页字号选择和开庭倒计时红字提示。有什么需要调整的随时说。

message.content: 字号解决，没有倒计时

content.text: 倒计时没显示，可能是因为条件太严格——需要同时满足 `sms.hearingTime != null` 且有 `isSubpoena` 的 PDF。让我看看当前的条件逻辑，以及数据中 hearingTime 的来源。

问题在于：开庭时间可能不在 SMS 的 `hearingTime` 里，而是在 PDF 解析后存在 `PdfDocumentEntity` 的 `hearingInfo` 中。而且 `isSubpoena` 标记也可能没被正确设置。

放宽条件：只要有 PDF 就显示倒计时，hearingTime 优先从 SMS 取，如果没有就从 PDF 的 hearingInfo 中解析。或者更简单——只要 `sms.hearingTime != null` 且有 PDF 就显示。

content.content: The file C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\ui\MainScreen.kt has been updated successfully.
